breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Live Free or Die
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: As Walt deals with the aftermath of the Casa Tranquila explosion, Hank works to wrap up his investigation of Gus' empire.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Hazard Pay
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Walt and Jesse formulate a new business plan. Walt shares a secret with Marie.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Madrigal
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Walt and Jesse pursue an unlikely business partner. The DEA filters through various leads in hopes of finding something.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Fifty-One
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Walt celebrates another birthday. Skyler contemplates her options, and an associate puts a crimp in Walt and Jesse's business strategy.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Dead Freight
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Walt's team gets creative to obtain the methylamine they need to continue their operation.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Gliding Over All
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Walt takes care of loose ends; Walt makes a dangerous decision.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Buyout
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Walt, Jesse, and Mike struggle over the future of their business, as occupational hazards weigh on Jesse.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Say My Name
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Walt takes control of business matters; Mike deals with the consequences of his actions.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Blood Money
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: As Walt and Jesse adjust to life out of the business, Hank grapples with a troubling lead.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Buried
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: While Skyler's past catches up with her, Walt covers his tracks. Jesse continues to struggle with his guilt.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Confessions
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Jesse decides to make a change, while Walt and Skyler try to deal with an unexpected demand.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Rabid Dog
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: An unusual strategy starts to bear fruit, while plans are set in motion that could change everything.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: To'hajiilee
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Things heat up for Walt in unexpected ways.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Ozymandias
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Everyone copes with radically changed circumstances.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Granite State
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: Events set in motion long ago move toward a conclusion.

breaking-bad-2008-tv.name: Felina
breaking-bad-2008-tv.overview: All bad things must come to an end.

chernobyl-2019-tv.overview: April 26, 1986, Ukrainian SSR. Plant workers and firefighters put their lives on the line to control a catastrophic 1986 explosion at a Soviet nuclear power plant.

chernobyl-2019-tv.name: Please Remain Calm
chernobyl-2019-tv.overview: With untold millions at risk after the Chernobyl explosion, nuclear physicist Ulana Khomyuk makes a desperate attempt to reach Valery Legasov, a leading Soviet nuclear physicist, and warn him about the threat of second explosion that could devastate the continent.

chernobyl-2019-tv.name: Open Wide, O Earth
chernobyl-2019-tv.overview: Lyudmilla Ignatenko, a Pripyat resident, ignores warning about her firefighter husband's contamination. Valery Legasov lays out a decontamination plan, complete with human risks.

chernobyl-2019-tv.name: The Happiness of All Mankind
chernobyl-2019-tv.overview: Valery Legasov and Soviet Deputy Prime Minister Boris Shcherbina consider using lunar rovers to remove radioactive debris, while Ulana Khomyuk faces government hurdles in determining the truth about the cause of the explosion.

chernobyl-2019-tv.name: Vichnaya Pamyat
chernobyl-2019-tv.overview: Valery Legasov, Boris Shcherbina and Ulana Khomyuk risk their lives and reputations to expose the truth about Chernobyl.

avatar-the-last-airbender-2005-tv.name: Return to Omashu
avatar-the-last-airbender-2005-tv.overview: Despite the shocking news the gang have just discovered, Aang insists on trying to find Bumi within Omashu's borders, even with the dangers that will await him and his friends if his real identity is discovered.  Meanwhile Azula goes in search of old friends to help her with her mission.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Hot Shots
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'What they need is a union.' -- Russell

Bunk and Freamon chase their crime scene, a container ship, to Philly. Lt. Cedric Daniels--disgusted with his exile to the evidence control unit--makes it known that he's leaving. On orders from Barksdale, Bell finds a way to set up the correctional officer who's been harassing Wee-Bey. McNulty pursues the identity of the Jane Doe found floating in the harbor.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Bad Dreams
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'I need to get clean' -- Sobotka

With the clock ticking, the Detail makes a desperate move, and Daniels reams out Landsman for dropping the ball. Nick's deceit is in the open as Sobotka is overwhelmed by bad news. The Greeks ease out of an encounter with the Detail, and Omar's suspicions are validated. The Detail hopes to find Vondas's boss, and Nick hopes to repair relations with the Greeks.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Backwash
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'Don't worry, kid. You're still on the clock.' -- Horseface

Russell tells Sobotka the investigation is over, but, in fact, a port computer is cloned, and when a container goes missing, the detectives follow. Simultaneously, Greggs and Prez tap into a circuit of Russian prostitutes. With two sets of evidence, the detail goes to Pearlman. Neither crime merits wiretap--but a drug connect could give the case legs.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Collateral Damage
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'They can chew you up, but they gotta spit you out.' -- McNulty

Major Valchek gets back at Sobotka for the church gift fiasco, and a feud begins. Valchek ups the ante by asking Deputy Commissioner Burrell for a detail to go after Sobotka. Avon Barksdale continues to run his empire from a prison cell--counseling his nephew D'Angelo and going after a guard who is harassing the organization's convicted hit-man Wee-Bey.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Ebb Tide
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'Ain't never gonna be what it was.' -- Little Big Roy

Det. Jimmy McNulty--exiled to police-boat duty--makes a shocking discovery in the Baltimore harbor. Bodie drives to Philly to make a connection for the Barksdale crew and Stringer Bell takes the train to New York to feel out the crew's reticent suppliers.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Hard Cases
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'If I hear the music, I'm gonna dance.' -- Greggs

Sobotka reprimands his nephew Nick for stealing the cameras and orders him to bring the cargo back--too late. McNulty is on a self-assigned moral mission to identify his floater, but his old partner, Bunk, says they have a more pressing matter at hand: to find Omar so he can testify against a Barksdale trigger man in one of last year's murders.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Duck and Cover
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'How come they don't fly away?' -- Ziggy

McNulty is back to his old self, on a drunken binge. Urged by fellow stevedores to fight Maui, Ziggy is again humiliated. Worried about McNulty, Bunk tries to get Daniels and Rawls to take him on. After some labor, the wiretap is up--just in time to catch another disappearing can. Sobotka meets with The Greek and Vondas, and they decide to change up.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Stray Rounds
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'The world is a smaller place now.' -- The Greek

Bodie's effort to improve sales ends disastrously, forcing Bell to rethink his strategy. Ziggy pulls Johnny Fifty into a new caper that should make the Greeks pay off big. McNulty, undercover and outnumbered in the brothel, awaits 'rescue.' Daniels and Pearlman stay cool as Valcheck fumes over the change of targets--and Burrell pulls the rug out from under him.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: All Prologue
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'It don't matter that some fool say he different...' -- D'Angelo

Trying to let go of police work and return to his marriage, McNulty gives up on identifying his Jane Doe. In their investigation of Sobotka, the detectives discover a pattern in the computer and explain the connection to Daniels, but he still won't take the murders. Sobotka tries to play the political game on behalf of his union.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Storm Warnings
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'It pays to go with the union card every time.' -- Ziggy

The Detail uses satellite technology to its advantage. Bodie is unhappy that Proposition Joe's people are slinging on his turf, but business flows--until a new face arrives. Stringer Bell looks to an unlikely solution to the problem. Valcheck visits the FBI in an attempt to get real results on the docks. Ziggy's deal with Double-G goes bad in a big way.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Undertow
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'They used to make steel there, no?' -- Spiros Vondas

Ziggy loses his prized Camaro to drug dealers. Unable to dump the homicide investigation on other agencies, Rawls measures Bunk for the blame, if the cases go unsolved. Homicide detectives hand out grand jury summonses to stevedores involved in the homicide case, and port cop Beadie Russell talks to an old boyfriend to find out how cargo disappears from the docks.

the-wire-2002-tv.name: Port in a Storm
the-wire-2002-tv.overview:
'Business. Always business.' -- The Greek

The Detail has a setback, while Russell and Bunk revisit Philly to look for evidence. Brother Mouzone talks with Stringer Bell about their agreement, leaving Bell to contend with a dissatisfied Avon Barksdale. Bubbles and Johnny pull another caper and McNulty and Greggs return to the Westside, where they discover new connections.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Stalingrad (June 1942-February 1943)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Hitler's early successes in Russia made him reckless and he resolves to capture Stalingrad. The battle lasts six months with the Russians emerging as victors. The Wehrmacht never recovers.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Wolfpack: U-Boats in the Atlantic (1939–1944)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: In a war of high technology and animal courage, the German U-Boats fight Allied merchantmen, hounding them in packs.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Red Star: The Soviet Union (1941–1943)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: For two years the Soviet Army fights the Germans almost alone. After one of the greatest land battles in history, the nation survives and triumphs - but with a loss of no less than twenty million of its people.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Whirlwind: Bombing Germany (September 1939–April 1944)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Bomber Command begin bombing German cities by night and the Americans reinforce the attacks by day; a whirlwind of terror and destruction that will win the war.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Tough Old Gut: Italy (November 1942-June 1944)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Churchill called Italy the 'soft underbelly of the crocodile' and thought the Allies could cut through it to the heart of Germany. By the soft underbelly turned out to be a 'tough old gut'.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: It's a Lovely Day Tomorrow: Burma (1942–1944)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Vera Lynn sang of a lovely day tomorrow, but the war in Burma was mud and monsoon. Britain's largest army learned to master the jungle and fought the Japanese to standstill.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Home Fires: Britain (1940–1944)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Finding strength in unity at home in Britain during the war, it was a time of gas masks, Winston Churchill, Dig for Victory, evacuation, George Formby, the Land Army, ITMA, the Squander Bug and the Beveridge Report.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Inside the Reich: Germany (1940–1944)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Initial victory in Europe turns sour after the defeat at Stalingrad, yet Germany prepares to fight to the end - even after an assassination attempt on the Führer.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Morning (June–August 1944)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: The Western Allies resolve to invade Europe. England becomes a floating supply dump and the British and Americans assemble the largest invasion fleet in history. It is June 6th 1944 - D Day.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Pincers (August 1944–March 1945)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: The end of the war appears close at hand with the liberation of Paris in 1944, but the British and Americans disagree on how to advance. Meanwhile, Poland suffers devastating losses to achieve victory.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Occupation: Holland (1940–1944)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Through a neutral country, Holland is attacked by Germany without warning in 1940. During the next four years, life carries on seemingly without incident, but underneath resistance never dies.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Genocide (1941–1945)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: The Nazi's are racist; the Aryans are a master race, others, particularly the Jews are sub-human. Himmler's SS sets about ridding Europe of millions of Jews.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Nemesis (February–May 1945)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Hitler retreats to the Fuhrer bunker is Berlin as Germany crumbles around him and his lieutenants abandon him to a fate of suicide. Meanwhile, the Russians raise the red flag in Berlin.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Pacific - The Island to Island War (February 1942–July 1945)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: The Americans fight their way across the Pacific towards Japan and the Phillipines. Perhaps the bloodiest campaign of all, each island has to be taken by storm and the Japanese fight to the last man.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Japan (1941–1945)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Initially apprehensive about the outcome of declaring war, the Japanese quickly turn to celebration with early victory. In the end, their worst fears are unimaginably exceeded.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Reckoning (April 1945)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: The war ends slowly and messily. Britain is victorious but exhausted and the super-powers confront each other as they decide the fate of Europe.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: The Atomic Bomb (February–September 1945)
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: Western scientists have developed a new, immensely powerful weapon - the atomic bomb. On August 6th 1945, the Enola Gay delivers the world's first atomic bomb to Hiroshima. The world would be forever altered.

the-world-at-war-1973-tv.name: Remember
the-world-at-war-1973-tv.overview: For many the Second World War was the most significant experience of their lives. Heartbreaking first hand remembrances from a vast array of survivors on both sides of the war.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: Denial, Anger, Acceptance
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: Uncle Junior's associate Mikey Palmice stirs things up by making Junior think Tony wants to be next in line for boss. Meanwhile, Tony, Paulie and Silvio deal with Hasidic family problems.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: 46 Long
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: With acting boss Jackie Aprile dying of cancer, Tony prepares for a power struggle with Uncle Junior. Christopher and his associate Brendan make trouble for themselves when they jack a truck full of DVD players. Tony's mother Livia finally agrees to live in a retirement community. Big Pussy and Paulie Walnuts are sent to find a stolen car.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: The Sopranos
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: After suffering a series of mysterious anxiety attacks, New Jersey mob boss Tony Soprano agrees to see a psychiatrist, Dr. Jennifer Melfi. As he opens up to the doctor, Tony reveals details about his problems at home and at work that involve his wife Carmela, his kids Meadow and Anthony Jr., his Uncle Junior and his domineering mother Livia.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: Meadowlands
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: Jackie Aprile's health worsens, forcing Tony to make a tough decision. Meanwhile, Anthony Jr. learns the true nature of his father's job in 'waste management.' Also, Tony hires sleazy police lieutenant Vin Makazian to investigate Dr. Melfi's background.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: College
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: During a trip to Maine for Meadow's college interviews, Tony sees a man he believes is a relocated mob snitch. Back at home, Carmela receives comfort from Father Phil.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: Pax Soprana
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: At Tony's suggestion, Junior is made acting boss after Jackie dies. In therapy, Tony surprises Dr. Melfi with an admission. Carmela and Irina (Tony's mistress) both suffer as Tony's libido takes a nosedive.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: Down Neck
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: After stealing the 'sacramental wine' from the school chapel, Anthony Jr. is suspended. Tony is concerned that his bad influence is responsible for his son's behavior, and has a series of disturbing flashbacks in which he remembers learning that his own father was in the mob.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: The Legend of Tennessee Moltisanti
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: At the wedding of Larry Boy's daughter, the 'boys' find out they're going to be indicted, and make a premature exit to get rid of incriminating evidence at home. Upset that he isn't getting the notoriety of other family members, an agitated Christopher has an ugly encounter with a bakery clerk.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: A Hit Is a Hit
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: Christopher and Adrianna cut a deal with a famous gangsta rapper who claims that Hesh pocketed royalties belonging to a cousin who recorded several hit songs decades ago. Meanwhile, Tony plays golf with Cusamano and his white-bread friends.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: Boca
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: Uncle Junior enjoys a romantic tryst in Boca with his girlfriend Bobbi, not realizing that she's been gabbing to her beauty-parlor friends about his oral talents. Meanwhile, controversy arises when Meadow's soccer coach announces he's leaving the school.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: Nobody Knows Anything
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: After Jimmy and Pussy are arrested in an FBI raid, Makazian tells a stunned Tony that Pussy may be wired for the Feds. Tony sends Paulie to find out for sure. Later, Tony learns that Makazian might be trying to frame Pussy to get out of his gambling debts.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: Isabella
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: Hit men are sent out to whack Tony, who comes out of his depression when he meets Isabella, an Italian exchange student staying next door.

the-sopranos-1999-tv.name: I Dream of Jeannie Cusamano
the-sopranos-1999-tv.overview: In the Season One finale, Tony is stunned to discover that the attempt on his life may have been ordered by someone very close to him. Later, he must deal with the fact that everyone knows he is seeing a shrink. Christopher is sent to take care of Jimmy Altieri.

game-of-thrones-2011-tv.name: Winterfell
game-of-thrones-2011-tv.overview: Arriving at Winterfell, Jon and Daenerys struggle to unite a divided North. Jon Snow gets some big news.

game-of-thrones-2011-tv.name: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
game-of-thrones-2011-tv.overview: The battle at Winterfell is approaching. Jaime is confronted with the consequences of the past. A tense interaction between Sansa and Daenerys follows.

game-of-thrones-2011-tv.name: The Last of the Starks
game-of-thrones-2011-tv.overview: In the wake of a costly victory, Jon and Daenerys look to the south as Tyrion eyes a compromise that could save countless lives.

game-of-thrones-2011-tv.name: The Long Night
game-of-thrones-2011-tv.overview: The Night King and his army have arrived at Winterfell and the great battle begins. Arya looks to prove her worth as a fighter.

game-of-thrones-2011-tv.name: The Bells
game-of-thrones-2011-tv.overview: Daenerys brings her forces to King's Landing.

game-of-thrones-2011-tv.name: The Iron Throne
game-of-thrones-2011-tv.overview: In the aftermath of the devastating attack on King's Landing, Daenerys must face the survivors.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 2
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: Traveling to and from Seoul, Song-hwa takes on a VIP client in need of surgery. A woman with pregnancy complications fights to keep her baby alive.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 4
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: Worries about Ik-sun plague Jun-wan's ever-busy days. While watching over a patient post-surgery, Heo Seon-bin experiences a critical lesson.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 3
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: An urgent case involving a liver transplant between a father and son is brought to Ik-jun's attention. Jun-wan has big news for one of his patients.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 1
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: As life at the hospital goes on, the five friends' growing pains continue. Gyeo-ul is disquieted by frequent visits from a patient's mother.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 7
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: Ik-jun’s team deals with a patient’s anxious brother — and his overbearing attitude. Chu Min-ha leaves a bad impression on a visitor in the cafeteria.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 5
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: Gyeo-ul receives a disturbing noise complaint about one of Ik-jun's patients. Seok-hyeong opens up to Song-hwa, who gives him a piece of advice.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 8
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: Jeong Rosa fears the worst when her memory continues to decline. Song-hwa grapples with the unforeseen diagnosis of a loved one.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 6
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: From student to intern for Yun-bok and Hong-do, and resident to fellow for Gyeo-ul, every step forward comes with plenty of hiccups — and new learnings.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 9
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: A hospital ping pong tournament brings out each department's competitive streak. Ik-sun and Jun-wan make plans to meet for a proper chat.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 10
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: The five friends leave for vacation together, but not all of them make it to the destination. Jae-hak and his wife navigate one surprise after another.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 11
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: One of the hospital's doctors is rushed into the emergency room. A patient with an unanticipated condition poses a challenge for Song-hwa and her team.

hospital-playlist-2020-tv.name: Episode 12
hospital-playlist-2020-tv.overview: A series of tough choices and sudden crises keeps life at the hospital as busy as ever. Through it all, the five friends continue to follow their hearts.

rick-and-morty-2013-tv.name: Mortgully: The Last Rickforest
rick-and-morty-2013-tv.overview: Rick and Morty gotta evolve, broh.

sherlock-2010-tv.name: A Study in Pink
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: A war hero, invalided home from Afghanistan, meets a strange but charismatic genius who is looking for a flatmate; it is London, 2010, and Dr Watson and Sherlock Holmes are meeting for the first time. A string of impossible suicides has Scotland Yard baffled - and only one man can help.

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Blind Banker
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: A mysterious cipher is being scrawled on the walls around London. The first person to see the cipher is dead within hours of reading it. Sherlock plunges into a world of codes and symbols, consulting with London's best graffiti artists. He soon learns that the city is in the grip a gang of international smugglers, a secret society called the Black Lotus.

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Great Game
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: A strange clue in an empty room, a blood-soaked car, a priceless Old Master, a deranged bomber. With the clock ticking, the curtain rises on a battle of wits between Sherlock, John and the shadowy stranger who seems to know all the answers...

sherlock-2010-tv.name: A Scandal in Belgravia
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: Blackmail threatens the monarchy and Sherlock is about to meet the woman who beats him.

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Hounds of Baskerville
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: A hound from hell. Sherlock's most famous case. But is a monster really stalking Dartmoor?

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Reichenbach Fall
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: The return of Moriarty. The crime of the century. Can Sherlock possibly survive?

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Empty Hearse
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: Two years on from reports of his Reichenbach Fall demise, Sherlock resurfaces as London comes under threat of a huge terrorist attack. John, though, has mixed feelings about his friend's shocking return.

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Sign of Three
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: Sherlock faces his biggest challenge of all – delivering a Best Man’s speech on John’s wedding day! But all isn’t quite as it seems. Mortal danger stalks the reception – and someone might not make it to the happy couple’s first dance. Sherlock must thank the bridesmaids, solve the case and stop a killer.

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Six Thatchers
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: Why is someone destroying images of Margaret Thatcher? Is there a madman on the loose? Or is there a much darker purpose at work?

sherlock-2010-tv.name: His Last Vow
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: A case of stolen letters leads Sherlock Holmes into a long conflict with Charles Augustus Magnussen, the Napoleon of blackmail, and the one man he truly hates. But how do you tackle a foe who knows the personal weakness of every person of importance in the Western world?

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Final Problem
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: Holmes and Watson travel to Europe to escape Moriarty's vengeance.

sherlock-2010-tv.name: The Lying Detective
sherlock-2010-tv.overview: Sherlock faces perhaps the most chilling enemy of his long career: the powerful and seemingly unassailable Culverton Smith – a man with a very dark secret indeed.

fargo-2014-tv.name: Waiting for Dutch
fargo-2014-tv.overview: In 1979, an unexpected turn of events at a diner disrupts the lives of the citizens in a small Minnesota town.

fargo-2014-tv.name: The Myth of Sisyphus
fargo-2014-tv.overview: The Gerhardts' search for Rye intensifies. Lou takes a trip to Fargo. Peggy overhears a new theory about the Waffle Hut shooter.

fargo-2014-tv.name: Fear and Trembling
fargo-2014-tv.overview: Floyd responds to Kansas City’s proposal, Hanzee takes a road trip, and Lou has a realization.

fargo-2014-tv.name: Before the Law
fargo-2014-tv.overview: The Gerhardts get a surprising offer, and two unlikely murderers do their best to clean up their mess.

fargo-2014-tv.name: The Gift of the Magi
fargo-2014-tv.overview: Floyd takes action, and Charlie tries to prove himself. Peggy and Ed disagree about what to do next, while Lou finds himself sidelined during Ronald Reagan’s campaign tour.

fargo-2014-tv.name: Rhinoceros
fargo-2014-tv.overview: Lou and Hank try to prevent an altercation, Peggy and Ed defend their choices and the Gerhardt clan attempts to get back one of their own.

fargo-2014-tv.name: The Castle
fargo-2014-tv.overview: Peggy and Ed agree to follow through with their plan at the Motor Motel, Lou faces jurisdictional politics and Hanzee reports back to the Gerhardts.

fargo-2014-tv.name: Did You Do This? No, You Did It!
fargo-2014-tv.overview: Lou and Hank investigate in Fargo, The King of Breakfast visits Betsy and Molly, Floyd is summoned away and Bear questions a family member’s loyalty.

fargo-2014-tv.name: Loplop
fargo-2014-tv.overview: Hanzee searches for Peggy and Ed. Dodd ends up in unfamiliar territory.

fargo-2014-tv.name: Palindrome
fargo-2014-tv.overview: Peggy and Ed make a run for it.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Mr. Denton on Doomsday
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Time Enough at Last
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A bank teller, obsessed with reading, faces conflicts at work and home because of his passion for literature.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Perchance to Dream
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A man with a heart condition explains to his psychiatrist that he feels extremely tired, because he is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: It's a Good Life
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: On an isolated family farm in Peakesville, Ohio, young Anthony Fremont, who has vast mental powers but lacks emotional development, holds his terrified family and neighbors in thrall to his every juvenile wish.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Deaths-Head Revisited
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce, and is met by one of his victims.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Judgment Night
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Midnight Sun
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Still Valley
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Five Characters in Search of an Exit
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Once Upon a Time

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Nothing in the Dark
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Dead Man's Shoes
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: A Quality of Mercy
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A gung ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: One More Pallbearer
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Kick the Can
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A retiree living in a rest home thinks he has discovered the secret of youth — acting young, and in particular playing a children's game called "kick-the-can".

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Hunt
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Showdown with Rance McGrew
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: The star of a Western TV series suddenly finds himself transported back in time to the real Wild West, and face-to-face with the real Jesse James.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: A Piano in the House
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: To Serve Man
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: An alien race comes to Earth, promising peace and sharing technology. A team of linguists sets out to translate the aliens' language, using a book whose title they deduce to be "To Serve Man."

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Last Rites of Jeff Myrtlebank
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Fugitive
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Little Girl Lost
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Awakened by the cries of their daughter Bettina, Chris and Ruth Miller enter her room to find that she has vanished, even though they still hear her crying for help. Chris' physicist friend Bill thinks she moved into another dimension.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Hocus-Pocus and Frisby
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Four O'Clock
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Little People

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Trade-Ins
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Young Man's Fancy
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: When a newlywed couple briefly return to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Gift
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Dummy
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil.  He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy:  plans that Willie doesn't support!

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: I Sing the Body Electric
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Cavender is Coming
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Changing of the Guard
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, made an effect on the lives of his students over the years.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: In His Image
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A scientist tries to correct his imperfections by building a mechanical likeness of himself, which includes of all the finer qualities he is lacking.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Thirty-Fathom Grave
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Valley of the Shadow
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A reporter finds himself trapped in a small town where people can reverse time and do many other amazing things.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: He's Alive
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A small American Neo-Nazi group struggles pathetically to succeed in a big city. A mysterious figure begins to guide their young, insecure leader, and the group begins to draw more attention.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Jess-Belle

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Miniature
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A lonely man falls in love with a mini museum doll, which he believes is alive.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Death Ship
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A three-man spacecraft lands on a planet only to discover the wreckage of a spacecraft identical to their own. Two of the crew are convinced that they are dead, but the captain refuses to see the truth.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Printer's Devil
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A wily old man, hired by a bankrupt newspaper editor, has the knack of predicting headline stories and claims to be the Devil.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: No Time Like the Past
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A man travels back in time to try to prevent some of history's catastrophes.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Parallel
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: An astronaut blacks out while orbiting the earth and ends up in a parallel universe.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The New Exhibit
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile. When his wife attempts to destroy them, a new murderous rampage begins...

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: I Dream of Genie
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Of Late I Think of Cliffordville
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired...an arsenal that's not as powerful as he thinks.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Passage on the Lady Anne
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A quarrelsome young couple find themselves taking a trip on the Lady Anne, an old passenger liner that is transporting a group of equally old passengers.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Incredible World of Horace Ford
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: On Thursday We Leave for Home
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: The leader of an expedition on an asteroid tries to convince the others that Earth is not worth returning to.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Bard
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: In Praise of Pip
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Max Phillips is an alcoholic bookie that regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Nightmare at 20,000 Feet
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A man, newly recovered from a nervous breakdown, becomes convinced that a monster only he sees is damaging the plane he's flying in.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Steel
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A small-time promoter desperately in need of money takes the place of his broken-down robot in a prize fight where humans are barred from participating.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: A Kind of a Stopwatch
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: The world's biggest bore and most avid talker gets a magical stopwatch that can stop everything except him.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Old Man in the Cave
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Last Night of a Jockey
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Barred from the track for life, crooked jockey Grady boozily expresses the wish to escape his sordid surroundings and become a truly "big man." His wish is granted by his lookalike alter ego, but there's a heavy price to be paid at fadeout time.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Uncle Simon
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: To inherit her insufferable Uncle's estate, a woman learns she must serve his latest invention, which is endowed with his own persona.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Living Doll
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter.  He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Ninety Years Without Slumbering
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Probe 7, Over and Out
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The 7th Is Made Up of Phantoms
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A modern day National Guard unit find themselves in the middle of Custer's Last Stand at the Battle of Little Big Horn.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: A Short Drink from a Certain Fountain
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Long Morrow
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Before leaving on a decades long mission, astronaut Douglas Stansfield meets a woman and falls in love.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Self-Improvement of Salvadore Ross
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A man finds that he can trade characteristics with others.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Ring-a-Ding Girl
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A fan-club gift draws a movie star back home, where she disrupts local plans for a town picnic by offering a one-woman show.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: You Drive
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Night Call
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: An elderly, wheelchair-bound lady receives strange anonymous phone calls in the middle of the night.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Number 12 Looks Just Like You
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: From Agnes – With Love
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Black Leather Jackets
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Spur of the Moment
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: What's in the Box
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and it's horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Queen of the Nile
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A columnist interviews a famous movie actress who has a secret to her eternal beauty.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Masks
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A wealthy dying man invites his family to a Mardi Gras party and insists that they wear masks specially made for them, threatening to cut off their inheritance if they refuse.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Sounds and Silences
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: I Am the Night - Color Me Black
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: As a Confederate spy is about to be hanged, the rope breaks and he falls to the water below. Finally free, he races for his home where his family awaits... as does the terrible truth of his future...

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Caesar and Me
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing  burglaries.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Jeopardy Room
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A KGB agent plays games with a defector, whose life he's been ordered to take, by giving him three hours to find and defuse a bomb he has hidden in his room.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Encounter
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Stopover in a Quiet Town
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: The morning after a wild night of partying, a hungover married couple awaken in an unfamiliar and artificial place.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Fear
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Two people in a remote cabin find signs of an extraterrestrial.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Brain Center at Whipple's
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Mr. Garrity and the Graves
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: Come Wander with Me
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: A singer searches for an authentic folk song.

the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.name: The Bewitchin' Pool
the-twilight-zone-1959-tv.overview: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Waiting in the Wings
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Livia, wife of Emperor Augustus plots against his daughter Julia and manages to convince him to bring her son Tiberius back from exile.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: A Touch of Murder
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Livia, the scheming wife of Augustus, seeks to disinherit her husband's grand-children in favour of her own son Tiberius.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Some Justice
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: As Augustus learned of Livia's plot against Postumus, she took action which resulted in Tiberius becoming emperor. The situation in the East now threatens Tiberius's position.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Queen of Heaven
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Germanicus has been murdered in Antioch and his wife Agrippina is convinced Tiberius ordered the killing. Livia has discovered that Caligula helped to poison his father. While Tiberius's perversions have become notorious, his right-hand man Sejanus, commander of the Praetorian Guard, gathers more power for himself, including a marriage alliance with Claudius.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Poison is Queen
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: The Imperial Army on the Rhine has been wiped out and Tiberius sent to avenge the defeat, followed later by Germanicus. Livia has discredited Postumus, who has been banished. Augustus has been feeling unwell, but is avoiding suspicions of poisoning by eating figs from his own garden.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: What Shall We Do About Claudius?
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Livia has engineered the downfall of Julia, who has been banished. Tiberius is recalled to Rome and is joint heir with Postumus. Poor stumbling, stuttering Claudius finds a friend in Herod, king of the Jews.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Reign of Terror
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: With Tiberius retired to Capri, Sejanus plans to tighten his grip on Rome and divorces his wife so he can marry Livilla. But he also has powerful enemies and his attempts to consolidate power set in motion a bloody chain of events.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Zeus, By Jove!
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Claudius has high hopes of a return to a Republic when Caligula insanely proclaims himself a god and his sister a goddess... but Rome officially accepts his divinity.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Hail Who?
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Caligula's erratic behaviour continues, as he makes his horse a senator and turns the palace into a brothel. Many in the Praetorian Guard grow to realise that their ruler is insane and, fearing the collapse of Rome itself, believe that something needs to be done.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Fool's Luck
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Claudius is happily married, while the mad Caligula has been assassinated. To his astonishment, Claudius has been proclaimed emperor by the Praetorian Guard.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: A God in Colchester
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Claudius has ruled wisely for a year with the support of Messalina, whom he deeply loves. Convinced of her devotion, he is totally unaware that she is deceiving him.

i-claudius-1976-tv.name: Old King Log
i-claudius-1976-tv.overview: Almost at the end of his family history, Claudius' thoughts turn to the future of Rome.

arcane-2021-tv.name: Heavy Is the Crown
arcane-2021-tv.overview: Vi and Caitlyn wrestle with how best to respond in the wake of a terrible tragedy that claims lives — and escalates tensions between the twin cities.

arcane-2021-tv.name: Watch It All Burn
arcane-2021-tv.overview: With Piltover ready for war, the Undercity weighs its options. Jinx lies low and plots her next move. A pivotal conversation takes place.

arcane-2021-tv.name: Finally Got the Name Right
arcane-2021-tv.overview: Caitlyn doubles down on her hunt for Jinx. Ambessa accepts a fateful meeting. Changes in Zaun lead to a shocking discovery.

arcane-2021-tv.name: Paint the Town Blue
arcane-2021-tv.overview: As rumors of Jinx's return swirl, Ambessa pursues her target with renewed enthusiasm. Jinx and Sevika go undercover and into the belly of the beast.

arcane-2021-tv.name: Blisters and Bedrock
arcane-2021-tv.overview: Vi awakens to surprising news. An unsettling reunion isn't what it seems. Caitlyn uncovers the origins of Shimmer.

arcane-2021-tv.name: The Message Hidden Within the Pattern
arcane-2021-tv.overview: Healing comes from a familiar face — in an unfamiliar place. A stunning betrayal threatens to change countless lives.

arcane-2021-tv.name: Killing Is a Cycle
arcane-2021-tv.overview: A brewing storm fuels a series of startling transformations. Elsewhere, the spark of rebellion still burns.

arcane-2021-tv.name: Pretend Like It's the First Time
arcane-2021-tv.overview: A moment of darkness, a moment of light — and a vision of What Could Have Been.

arcane-2021-tv.name: The Dirt Under Your Nails
arcane-2021-tv.overview: Magic. Science. Power. Revenge. Destinies clash in an epic final chapter, igniting an all-out war.

the-office-2005-tv.name: Customer Loyalty
the-office-2005-tv.overview: Dwight tries to stop Darryl from moving to Jim's start-up company. Jim misses his daughter's first recital, to Pam's dismay. Nellie spills the beans about Pete and Erin.

when-they-see-us-2019-tv.name: Part One
when-they-see-us-2019-tv.overview: In the spring of 1989, five boys of color are arrested, interrogated and coerced into confessing to the vicious attack of a woman in Central Park.

when-they-see-us-2019-tv.name: Part Two
when-they-see-us-2019-tv.overview: As the jogger case stirs tensions nationwide, the families of the boys and their lawyers prepare for a bitter legal fight against the city of New York.

when-they-see-us-2019-tv.name: Part Three
when-they-see-us-2019-tv.overview: The boys struggle with the difficult reality of life behind bars. Years later, Raymond, Antron, Yusef and Kevin return home as men to a changed world.

when-they-see-us-2019-tv.name: Part Four
when-they-see-us-2019-tv.overview: At age 16, Korey begins a brutal journey through the adult prison system. A shocking turn of events reveals the truth of the crime, long ignored.

gravity-falls-2012-tv.name: Roadside Attraction
gravity-falls-2012-tv.overview: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

friends-1994-tv.name: Pilot
friends-1994-tv.overview: After Rachel leaves her fiancé at the altar, she moves in with Monica and finds that independence is not so easy, particularly without Daddy's credit cards.

friends-1994-tv.name: The One with the Sonogram at the End
friends-1994-tv.overview: Ross's lesbian ex-wife Carol is pregnant with his child, and he doesn't like her choice of last name for the baby. Rachel finds out that her ex-fiancé went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honor.

friends-1994-tv.name: The One with the Thumb
friends-1994-tv.overview: Monica finds it difficult to break up with her latest boyfriend whom everyone likes; Chandler is reunited with his beloved cigarettes; Phoebe receives a large sum of money.

friends-1994-tv.name: The One with George Stephanopoulos
friends-1994-tv.overview: While the men attend a hockey game and end up at a hospital, a delivery man accidentally brings a pizza meant for George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street from the girls; they decide to peek at the former White House advisor with their binoculars.

friends-1994-tv.name: The One with the East German Laundry Detergent
friends-1994-tv.overview: While Chandler and Phoebe decide to break up with their significant others on the same night, Ross helps Rachel do laundry and considers the evening a first date. Joey has Monica pose as his new girlfriend, because he wants to get back with the girl he just dumped.

friends-1994-tv.name: The One with the Butt
friends-1994-tv.overview: Joey gets his big film break when he's hired to be Al Pacino's stunt butt. Ross tries to be less conservative and Chandler thinks his fantasies have come true when he has an affair with a married woman.

friends-1994-tv.name: The One with the Blackout
friends-1994-tv.overview: A power outage leaves Chandler stranded in an ATM vestibule with Victoria's Secret model Jill Goodacre, whom he desperately tries to impress, Ross tries to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns that Monica used to be infatuated with him.

succession-2018-tv.name: Celebration
succession-2018-tv.overview: On his 80th birthday, media magnate Logan Roy, whose imminent retirement was thought to be a given, shocks his family by announcing he's staying on indefinitely as CEO of Waystar/Royco. The news shatters his son Kendall, the heir apparent who's in the midst of negotiating the purchase of a digital-media venture founded by a slick operator named Lawrence.

succession-2018-tv.name: Sh*t Show at the F**k Factory
succession-2018-tv.overview: Logan's incapacitation sets off a heated succession debate among his children, as the Board rushes to inform the media about leadership contingencies before the stock market opens. Greg is tasked to retrieve some important items from the Roy apartment. Kendall makes an impassioned final plea to keep Waystar/Royco in the family, and receives some sobering news.

succession-2018-tv.name: Lifeboats
succession-2018-tv.overview: With Waystar's stock plunging to dangerous lows, Kendall is confronted with a major crisis involving a secret bank debt. Upset with Marcia for pulling rank in the Roy apartment, Shiv decides to enlist an old paramour to conduct a background check on Logan's third wife. Kendall and Roman attend their first big meeting in their new roles, as do Tom and Greg.

succession-2018-tv.name: Sad Sack Wasp Trap
succession-2018-tv.overview: With the company’s annual foundation gala fundraiser approaching, and his dad out of the picture, Kendall polishes up his speech while enlisting an on-air personality from the Waystar’s ATV Networks to accompany him. Shiv tries to minimize damage from a sordid photo that threatens a client's political future. Tom inherits a “virus” from his predecessor.

succession-2018-tv.name: Prague
succession-2018-tv.overview: Tom has a bachelor’s party to remember. Kendall eyes a new business opportunity with a pair of idealistic entrepreneurs. Roman looks to land a deal for local TV stations with his father’s longtime nemesis. Logan tasks Greg to act as Kendall’s babysitter during Tom’s party. Shiv and Gil get ambushed during a TV interview on a Waystar network.

succession-2018-tv.name: I Went to Market
succession-2018-tv.overview: After hearing Logan’s plan to expand in to local TV, Kendall begins to plot a vote of no confidence against his father. Greg drives his ornery grandfather Ewan from Canada to New York for a Thanksgiving reunion with Logan. Tom grows increasingly concerned about the terms of his prenuptial agreement with Shiv, and recruits Greg for a clandestine task.

succession-2018-tv.name: Which Side Are You On?
succession-2018-tv.overview: With the vote of no confidence against Logan approaching, Roman attempts to sway a neutral board member, while Kendall frantically shores up his “yea” votes. Logan arrives in Washington to meet with the president, but worries he's been snubbed after a last-minute cancellation. After successfully thwarting a potential scandal, Tom introduces Greg to fine dining.

succession-2018-tv.name: Austerlitz
succession-2018-tv.overview: In an effort to fix his public image, Logan agrees to a family therapy session at Connor’s New Mexico ranch that Logan intends to double as a publicity stunt. While lying low, Kendall spends some time with the locals and finds his sobriety tested. Shiv considers putting herself in a precarious situation when Nate pushes her to join a potential presidential candidate’s team.

succession-2018-tv.name: Pre-Nuptial
succession-2018-tv.overview: The Roys assemble at an English castle to prepare for Shiv and Tom’s wedding. The children reunite with their mother Caroline, who is every bit as acerbic as Logan. As guests mingle and clash, Kendall learns from Stewy and Sandy that their plot for a hostile takeover of Waystar has been fast-tracked in order to catch Logan off guard.

succession-2018-tv.name: Nobody Is Ever Missing
succession-2018-tv.overview: Amidst the revelry of Tom and Shiv's wedding, Logan and his team find themselves in defense mode as word of the Waystar takeover bid spreads. Kendall finds an escape outlet as the situation becomes supercharged, while Tom parlays his new wife's candor into the removal of an unwanted guest. Season One Finale.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: Smells Like Mean Spirit
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: The newly promoted AFC Richmond face mockery as pundits predict they'll finish dead last this season.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: (I Don't Want to Go to) Chelsea
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: News of a top player looking to move to London sends the English clubs into a frenzy. Richmond play their first game back in the Premier League.
Richmond adjust to an exciting change, but Jamie has reservations. Ted learns there's something new going on back in Kansas as well.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: Big Week
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: Everyone's feeling the pressure as Richmond gear up to play West Ham. Ted is reunited with an old friend.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: Signs
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: With their season in a tailspin, Richmond try to right the ship against mighty Manchester City. Off the pitch, everyone faces their own setbacks.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: The Strings That Bind Us
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: The Greyhounds try a new strategy that has everyone thinking outside the box. Sam prepares to host a VIP guest at Ola's.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: Sunflowers
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: A friendly match takes the team to Amsterdam, where one night out unlocks truths for many.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: We'll Never Have Paris
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: While watching Henry, Ted fights the urge to spiral when Michelle and Dr. Jacob go on a romantic trip. An online leak has massive implications for Keeley.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: La Locker Room Aux Folles
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: Colin and Isaac's friendship is tested. Roy is asked to do a press conference.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: International Break
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: While some of the Greyhounds head home to play for their countries in international matches, Edwin Akufo brings a business proposal to Rebecca.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: Mom City
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: An unexpected guest has Ted on edge. When Richmond travel to Manchester for a big match, Roy and Keeley become concerned about Jamie.

ted-lasso-2020-tv.name: So Long, Farewell
ted-lasso-2020-tv.overview: AFC Richmond play their final game of the season.

curb-your-enthusiasm-2000-tv.name: Man Fights Tiny Woman
curb-your-enthusiasm-2000-tv.overview: Larry navigates the complexities of requesting a new chauffeur, letting his roofer do his job, and imparting some constructive criticism to his chiropractor.

black-mirror-2011-tv.name: The National Anthem
black-mirror-2011-tv.overview: Prime Minister Michael Callow faces a shocking dilemma when Princess Susannah, a much-loved member of the Royal Family, is kidnapped.

black-mirror-2011-tv.name: Fifteen Million Merits
black-mirror-2011-tv.overview: After failing to impress the judges on a singing competition show, a woman must either perform degrading acts or return to a slave-like existence.

black-mirror-2011-tv.name: The Entire History of You
black-mirror-2011-tv.overview: In the near future, everyone has access to a memory implant that records everything humans do, see and hear.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Mabel
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Jimmy and Chuck's relationship deteriorates. Kim feels the pressure of running her own firm. Mike investigates the note left on his car.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Witness
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Jimmy and Kim hire an assistant. Mike seeks out a mysterious acquaintance. Chuck uses the law to gain an advantage over Jimmy.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Sunk Costs
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Jimmy decides to represent a new client to Kim's dismay. Mike meets a formidable ally who gives a tempting offer.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Sabrosito
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Jimmy asks a favor of Mike; new complications disrupt Salamancas' business. Chuck and Jimmy struggle with a compromise.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Chicanery
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Kim and Jimmy face off with an adversary. Jimmy looks to Chuck's past to secure his future. Jimmy loses an ally and gains another.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Off Brand
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Jimmy has a new endeavor. Chuck pushes himself to the limit. Nacho finds himself in a power struggle.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Expenses
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Jimmy tries to settle debts. Nacho reunites with an acquaintance. Mike helps Stacey with a project and makes a connection.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Slip
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Jimmy is pushed to desperate measures. Nacho picks up a new skill. Mike explores an alliance. Kim stands up to Hamlin.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Fall
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Jimmy visits an old friend and takes up a new pastime. Chuck and Hamlin spar over the future of the firm. Kim faces challenges at work.

better-call-saul-2015-tv.name: Lantern
better-call-saul-2015-tv.overview: Kim takes time off. Jimmy tries to make amends. Nacho gambles with his future. Hamlin pushes Chuck to make a decision.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: A Horse Walks into a Rehab
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: BoJack checks into Pastiches, a Malibu rehab facility, where he grapples with memories of Sarah Lynn's death and his own troubled childhood.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: Feel-Good Story
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: Girl Croosh sends Diane on the road with rugged cameraman Guy, but she balks when they ask her to produce more feel-good stories.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: The New Client
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: When her nanny quits, Princess Carolyn struggles to balance the demands of work and parenting. Mr. Peanutbutter visits BoJack in rehab.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: Surprise!
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: Todd organizes a surprise wedding for Pickles and Mr. Peanutbutter, but the party quickly goes off the rails when Mr. Peanutbutter makes a confession.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: A Little Uneven, Is All
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: Dr. Champ tells BoJack it's time to leave rehab. Mr. Peanutbutter's reputation takes a hit. In Chicago, Diane wrestles with writer's block.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: The Kidney Stays in the Picture
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: The assistants of Hollywoo go on strike. BoJack tries to help Dr. Champ. When Todd learns that his mother needs a kidney, Diane comes up with a plan.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: The Face of Depression
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: BoJack travels around the country reconnecting with loved ones, while Mr. Peanutbutter embarks on his own national tour as the face of depression.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: A Quick One, While He's Away
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: A reporter digs into the circumstances surrounding Sarah Lynn's death. Hollyhock goes to a party in New York City.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: Intermediate Scene Study w/ BoJack Horseman
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: When BoJack starts teaching an acting class at Wesleyan, Hollyhock sets some boundaries in their relationship

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: Good Damage
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: Diane's depression lifts, but she's still struggling to start writing her memoir. Reporters Paige and Max pay Penny a visit.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: Sunk Cost and All That
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: While Paige and Max question Mr. Peanutbutter at his restaurant, a panicked BoJack tries to piece together what's happening.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: Xerox of a Xerox
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: After the Sarah Lynn story breaks, BoJack gives a live interview on TV. Diane meets Guy's teenage son.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: The Horny Unicorn
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: BoJack gets a new AA sponsor. Todd plans a sophisticated party to impress his parents. Diane gets to know Sonny.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: Angela
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: Angela Diaz reaches out to BoJack. Princess Carolyn gets an offer from Lenny Turteltaub. Todd cooks up a scheme.

bojack-horseman-2014-tv.name: The View from Halfway Down
bojack-horseman-2014-tv.overview: BoJack reconnects with faces from his past.

the-last-of-us-2023-tv.name: The Path
the-last-of-us-2023-tv.overview: After Dina shares crucial information, Ellie prepares to petition the town council, even while she struggles with her deep emotional scars. On the outskirts of Seattle, a religious sect attempts to flee a war – raising questions on what lies ahead.

the-simpsons-1989-tv.name: Bad Boys... for Life?
the-simpsons-1989-tv.overview: Is Bart Simpson truly a bad seed? Homer and Marge must find out once and for good.

skam-2015-tv.name: I knew there was something strange about her (Easter Special)
skam-2015-tv.overview: During the Easter holiday, Noora and the rest of the girls go to Chris' grandmother's cabin. On their way, they meet a weird boy named Kasper. They also play with an Ouija board and Vilde believes Sana has supernatural abilities.

skam-2015-tv.name: Are you hiding something from us?
skam-2015-tv.overview: Noora tries to keep the fact that she and William had a date a secret, especially from Vilde. Christoffer and some other of William's friends has been in a fight. William is hosting a large party in his apartment.

skam-2015-tv.name: I don't want to be protected
skam-2015-tv.overview: William's brother Nikolai has returned to Oslo, and Noora has problems with William not introducing her properly to him. The girls discuss the fact that Jonas has been beaten up. Noora and William see a strange meeting.

skam-2015-tv.name: I'm certainly not jealous
skam-2015-tv.overview: Noora is worried that she isn't caring enough about the Syrian refugee crisis. William and his bus crew are raising money they owe after trashing a cabin during Easter, and Noora calls him out on being egotistical.

skam-2015-tv.name: Noora, you need cock
skam-2015-tv.overview: The Russ celebration has begun. Noora is still keeping her and William's relationship secret from Vilde. Eskild takes on the case to find out if Isak is gay or not. The girls party with the third-year boys on their bus.

skam-2015-tv.name: You're only thinking of William
skam-2015-tv.overview: William tries to explain himself to Noora after he was involved in the fight. Sana gives Noora some advice, and Noora decides to come clean to Vilde. While looking for William, Noora ends up at Nikolai's party.

skam-2015-tv.name: I miss you so damn much
skam-2015-tv.overview: Noora wakes up naked in bed with Nikolai not remembering anything from the day before and suspects she has been raped. Sana's problems with some other Muslim girls get worse.

skam-2015-tv.name: You lie to a friend and blame me
skam-2015-tv.overview: Rumors about her ex Jonas is spreading through school to Eva's dismay. Sana experiences hostility from some of the other Muslim girls at school. Noora can't avoid going on a date she promised William any longer.

skam-2015-tv.name: If only you'd kept your promises
skam-2015-tv.overview: Noora and Vilde are in disagreement over sponsors for the bus. Noora's flatmates Eskild and Linn are introduced. Noora is trying to avoid William, who has become very pushy in his advances towards her.

skam-2015-tv.name: I'll explain everything
skam-2015-tv.overview: Eskild and Linn try to cheer Noora up, but she is still dealing with what happened last Friday. Noora reluctantly goes to Eva to celebrate May 17th, the National Day. She also decides to confront Nikolai, to find out exactly what happened.

skam-2015-tv.name: Do you seriously remember nothing?
skam-2015-tv.overview: Vilde visits Noora. Noora talks to one of the girls from Nikolai's party to find out the truth. William does not answer Noora's calls and messages and hasn't been seen at school.

skam-2015-tv.name: Will you move in with me?
skam-2015-tv.overview: Noora and William go back to William's apartment and finds a letter from the police. William is wanted for questioning for hitting a boy with a bottle in a fight. Vilde and Noora try to make sure no one witness against him.

upstairs-downstairs-1971-tv.name: The Bolter
upstairs-downstairs-1971-tv.overview: Hazel's first substantial encounter with fashionable society causes her great humiliation, marital distress and a near-fatal accident, when she and James visit Lord and Lady Newbury at Somerby Park.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: In the wake of the Cylon sneak attack, the ragtag fleet of human survivors is forced to play a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with their pursuers. Every 33 minutes, they make a jump to a new location. And every 33 minutes, the Cylons manage to find them. The pilots are on the brink of exhaustion, relying on artificial stimulants to keep fighting, and the civilians are beginning to doubt the leadership of Commander Adama and President Roslin.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Water
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: Lt. Sharon Valerii wakes up soaking wet in the tool room with an explosive charge in her duffel bag. Shortly afterward, a mysterious explosion destroys all the port-side water tanks on Galactica, creating a crisis for the entire fleet. Sharon can't remember a thing, but all the evidence points to her as a saboteur. She confesses her concern to Chief Tyrol, but he can't believe she's responsible.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Bastille Day
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: The fleet has found a source of water, but who will take on the difficult and dangerous job of mining it from the icy planet? Commander Adama and President Roslin send Lee to the Astral Queen, a prisoner transport ship, with an offer for its inmates: Volunteer for this mission and earn "freedom points".

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Act of Contrition
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: After a flight deck accident kills 13 pilots and wounds many others, Kara is thrust into service as a flight instructor and ordered to turn a group of civilian pilots and academy washouts into full-fledged Viper pilots.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: You Can't Go Home Again
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: When Lt. Kara Thrace goes missing in action after encountering a Cylon patrol while on a training mission, Commander Adama feels responsible — especially in light of her recent admission that she blames herself for his son Zak's death.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Litmus
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: When a new copy of Doral, a Cylon who had been previously exposed while serving as the Galactica's public-relations officer, sneaks aboard and blows himself up, killing three people, Commander Adama and President Roslin must finally make public the terrifying secret known only to a select few: Cylons now look like humans.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Six Degrees of Separation
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: When Baltar and the Number Six who lives in his head have a falling out, she abandons him, only to surface a short while later aboard the Galactica. But now she's called Shelley Godfrey, everyone can see her, and she's telling them that she has evidence, passed on by the late Dr. Amarak, that will prove Baltar sold out the human race to the Cylons.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Flesh and Bone
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: A Cylon, who calls himself Leoben, is discovered on one of the ships in the fleet. Commander Adama sends Kara to interrogate him — or, rather, it. The Cylon tells Kara that he planted a nuclear device on one of the ships. Although she doesn't believe it, Kara passes on the warning.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Tigh Me Up, Tigh Me Down
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: President Roslin's fears that Commander Adama is a Cylon are stoked when she learns he's making secret wireless calls to other ships. Then, to make things worse, a single Cylon raider appears near the Galactica and begins acting strangely after being damaged in battle.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: The Hand of God
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: As its fuel supply dwindles, the fleet must seek out a new supply of tylium ore or risk becoming sitting ducks to any Cylon attack. A recon patrol finds an asteroid full of the fuel, but there's a catch — the Cylons have found it first and established a heavily guarded refining plant.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Colonial Day
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: When President Roslin calls an Interim Quorum of the Twelve Colonies, she discovers that democracy brings its ugly stepsisters — politics and deadly intrigue — to the party. Tom Zarek, the charismatic convicted terrorist, is elected as the delegate from Sagittaron and immediately proposes elections for the vice-presidency.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Kobol's Last Gleaming (1)
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: While flying a supply patrol, Crashdown and Sharon Valerii discover a bountiful planet that can support human life. Indeed, it might be Kobol, the legendary "home of the gods." The discovery prompts Commander Adama to send a ground team to investigate; it also gives new life to President Roslin's belief that she is a tool of destiny and that this discovery, like her rapidly spreading cancer, is part of an ancient prophecy.

battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.name: Kobol's Last Gleaming (2)
battlestar-galactica-2004-tv.overview: When Commander Adama learns that Kara disobeyed orders and Jumped to Caprica on orders from President Roslin, he demands the president's resignation, with the implied threat of a military coup. Roslin refuses his demand and sparks a confrontation.

south-park-1997-tv.name: Sora Not Sorry
south-park-1997-tv.overview: Butters' Al revenge plan backfires, igniting an epidemic of fake videos at school that leaves Detective Harris struggling to tell fantasy from reality.

rome-2005-tv.name: An Owl in a Thornbush
rome-2005-tv.overview: With Caesar quickly advancing toward Rome, Pompey begins ordering a retreat and forces his citizens to pick sides. Timon is forced to do Atia's dirty work and Vorenus cannot understand why no one is resisting while on a scouting mission.

rome-2005-tv.name: Caesarion
rome-2005-tv.overview: Having pursued Pompey into Egypt, Caesar arrives in Alexandria and meets the boy king Ptolemy XIII, who offers the general a surprise gift. Vorenus and Pullo play liberators again, freeing Ptolemy's incarcerated sister, Cleopatra. Caesar seeks payment from Egypt for past debts, and ends up forging a strategic union to ensure his legacy.

rome-2005-tv.name: Utica
rome-2005-tv.overview: With Scipio and Cato defeated, Caesar returns home to a hero's welcome. Vorenus and Pullo's showdown with local thug Erastes gets an unexpected reprieve from Caesar. Servilia's plan to use Octavia to unearth a secret about Caesar backfires.

rome-2005-tv.name: Triumph
rome-2005-tv.overview: Unanimously proclaimed Dictator by the Senate, Caesar pronounces the war over, and prepares for five days of feasting and games honoring his "triumph." No longer an enlisted soldier, Pullo eyes a pastoral future with Eirene, while Vorenus runs for municipal magistrate, with Posca's help. Meanwhile, Octavian retrieves Octavia from her self-imposed exile. And Servilia invites a revenge-minded Quintus Pompey into her home, to Brutus' dismay.

rome-2005-tv.name: The Spoils
rome-2005-tv.overview: Vorenus sees to it that veteran soldiers receives severance on behalf of Caesar, and is then invited along with Niobe to one of Atia's parties.

rome-2005-tv.name: Kalends of February
rome-2005-tv.overview: Pullo and Vorenus are now heroes in the eyes of the Roman rank and file because of their arena feats. This causes Caesar to bestow rewards to those he might normally punish.

rome-2005-tv.name: Passover
rome-2005-tv.overview: Things pick up shortly after Caesar's murder. Octavian wants to keep his family from fleeing the city so he devises a plan. News of this makes Antony happy so he tells Brutus. Vorenus mourns Niobe's death but casts aspersions upon his children.

rome-2005-tv.name: Son of Hades
rome-2005-tv.overview: Cleopatra arrives in Rome to pay her homage to Caesar, and to seek legitimization for Caesarion. Egypt's queen causes further complications between Anthony and Atia, who still struggles with Servilia. Timon's brother arrives from Jerusalem. The death of Erastes throws the underworld, and Rome's river commerce into chaos, and Pullo and Vorenus step into the gap. Octavian and Anthony begin a long and bitter rivalry with a dispute over Caesar's will and sharing of power.

rome-2005-tv.name: Testudo et Lepus (The Tortoise and the Hare)
rome-2005-tv.overview: Pullo races to find Vorenus with news of his family's fate. Servilia's plans to eliminate a rival exact a high price from her. Cicero is astonished when Octavian sends word that his victorious legions are coming home to Rome. In Rome, Timon finally grows weary of Atia's bidding.

rome-2005-tv.name: These Being the Words of Marcus Tullius Cicero
rome-2005-tv.overview: Brutus and Cassius struggle to raise foreign armies to oppose the Cesarean party. Mark Antony's plans to change his post-consul proconsular governorship from Macedonia to Gaul are derailed when Cicero delivers an in-absentia message to the Senate, and throws his support behind Octavian. Vorenus struggles to contain an all-out gang war in the Aventine Collegium, of his own making, that he blames on Pullo.
