In the house of the Julii, Octavia passes the hours in a drug induced daze, while a duplicitous youth named Duro, planted amongst the Julii by Servilia, looks for the chance to set a deadly plan in motion.

rome-2005-tv.name: Philippi
rome-2005-tv.overview: Vorenus receives orders to plunge Rome into a bloodbath the likes that have not been seen since the dictatorship of Sulla. Octavia reveals her secret to Atia, and the armies of the Liberators and the Caesarians clash for the last time, with the fate of Republic in the balance.

rome-2005-tv.name: Heroes of the Republic
rome-2005-tv.overview: Despite Pullo's advice, Vorenus and his family return to the Collegium with his family who is reunited, and cleansed of their ordeal. Octavian is denied a triumph and urges Cicero to endorse his bid to be made Consul in exchange for an agreement to allow Cicero to veto his actions. Octavian takes both Cicero and the Senate by surprise with his first Consular act. Vorenus attempts' to make peace with Memmio and Cotta create suspicions that he has gone soft.

rome-2005-tv.name: Death Mask
rome-2005-tv.overview: Antony's nature reasserts itself, and challenges his alliance with Octavian. Timon and Levi set themselves against Herod's plans. Servilia's public displays of grief leave Atia unsettled. Gaia uses Pullo's punishment as a weapon against him. His daughter's sudden interest in business matters arouses Vorenus' suspicions. Posca gets married.

rome-2005-tv.name: A Necessary Fiction
rome-2005-tv.overview: Octavian proclaims a new era of virtue in Rome, a program that his family and subordinates find impossible to obey. Vorenus is sent on a mission after a missing shipment of gold to discover who mysteriously hijacked it on its way to the Roman treasury. Pullo's loss and rage are channeled against Memmio, Omnipor and their henchmen. Octavian pursues Livia as an "appropriate" bride, and issues Mark Antony an ultimatum he knows he can't refuse.

rome-2005-tv.name: Deus Impeditio Esuritori Nullus (No God Can Stop a Hungry Man)
rome-2005-tv.overview: The people of Rome are starving. There have been many grain shortages over the past few months, but things have gotten particularly bad. In hopes of keeping the people from openly rebelling, Octavian sends Atia and Octavia to Alexandria in order to negotiate a deal with Mark Antony, though his real reasons for their trip is soon revealed. Meanwhile, Titus Pullo and Lucius Vorenus must try to keep the peace amongst many of the mercenaries who are in Rome.

rome-2005-tv.name: De Patre Vostro (About Your Father)
rome-2005-tv.overview: Following his naval defeat at Actium, Marc Antony returns to Egypt, where he and Cleopatra settle into a world of debauchery. Octavian tries to use Pullo as leverage to Vorenus to gain acess to the palace, but Vorenus stays loyal to Antony. Finally, it is Cleopatra who dupes Antony, saving her own life by sacrificing her honor. Ceasar Augustus triumphs in Rome.

primal-2019-tv.name: Sea of Despair
primal-2019-tv.overview: Spear and Fang venture into the unknown to rescue Mira from her captors.

primal-2019-tv.name: Dawn of Man
primal-2019-tv.overview: The quest to find Mira leads Spear and Fang to the village of fearsome warriors.

primal-2019-tv.name: Shadow of Fate
primal-2019-tv.overview: Spear and Fang get separated in a strange new land.

primal-2019-tv.name: The Primal Theory
primal-2019-tv.overview: A night of horrors reveals the true nature of man's origin.

primal-2019-tv.name: The Red Mist
primal-2019-tv.overview: Spear and Fang fight to save Mira from the warrior clan who enslaved her.

primal-2019-tv.name: Vidarr
primal-2019-tv.overview: Spear, Fang, and Mira are hunted by the last survivors of a village decimated by their carnage.

primal-2019-tv.name: The Colossaeus (1)
primal-2019-tv.overview: Spear, Fang, and Mira's journey home is threatened after encountering a mysterious threat at sea.

primal-2019-tv.name: The Colossaeus (2)
primal-2019-tv.overview: Spear and Fang are used as instruments of war for the tyrannical Queen of a formidable warship, the Colossaeus.

primal-2019-tv.name: The Colossaeus (3)
primal-2019-tv.overview: Spear, Fang and Mira lead a daring escape from the Colossaeus and the Queen bent on their destruction.

primal-2019-tv.name: Echoes of Eternity
primal-2019-tv.overview: An old vengeance returns to wreak havoc.

invincible-2021-tv.name: I GOTTA GET SOME AIR
invincible-2021-tv.overview: Consequences weigh on Mark. Oliver takes on a new job.

invincible-2021-tv.name: DON'T DO ANYTHING RASH
invincible-2021-tv.overview: Nothing goes according to plan during a massive confrontation.

invincible-2021-tv.name: GIVE US A MOMENT
invincible-2021-tv.overview: Mark embarks on a new and dangerous mission, throwing Debbie into a tailspin and plunging Eve into uncertainty.

invincible-2021-tv.name: DON'T LEAVE ME HANGING HERE
invincible-2021-tv.overview: Mark confronts his darkest fears as his life changes forever.

invincible-2021-tv.name: I'LL GIVE YOU THE GRAND TOUR
invincible-2021-tv.overview: Loyalties are challenged when an old enemy is revealed.

invincible-2021-tv.name: MAKING THE WORLD A BETTER PLACE
invincible-2021-tv.overview: Mark battles enemies new and old in his fight to keep Earth safe.

invincible-2021-tv.name: YOU LOOK HORRIBLE
invincible-2021-tv.overview: Family bonds are put to the test. Under pressure, Allen makes a new friend.

this-is-us-2016-tv.name: After the Fire
this-is-us-2016-tv.overview: Randall reflects on what could have been.

arrested-development-2003-tv.name: Sad Sack
arrested-development-2003-tv.overview: George Sr. fears he's losing Lucille to Oscar. Gob motivates Buster for the Army while Lindsay spends more time with Maeby to get closer to Steve Holt and Tobias starts working out.

house-2004-tv.name: Informed Consent
house-2004-tv.overview: House puts a well-known medical researcher through a battery of tests to determine why he collapsed in his lab. When the team is unable to diagnose the problem, the doctor asks the team to help him end his life. House is forced to use his cane again after the ketamine has worn off as he deals with a clinic patient's teenaged daughter who has a crush on him.

the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.name: Doink
the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.overview: Midge dives into a new line of work and makes some quirky friends along the way. Susie continues her emphatic quest to keep Midge's career moving forward, but gets hit with a couple setbacks. Both Midge and Joel experience the downsides of their new lifestyles.

the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.name: Because You Left
the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.overview: After another arrest, Midge finds herself in legal trouble, forcing her to rely on Susie's street smarts. Abe approaches Moishe with an interesting proposition. Lenny Bruce offers some unconventional inspiration for Midge's act.

the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.name: Mrs. X at the Gaslight
the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.overview: Midge finds a different kind of audience to perform for, much to Susie's chagrin. Abe gets offered the experience of a lifetime. The Weissmans come together for a family dinner. Susie finally shows off her management skills.

the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.name: Put That on Your Plate!
the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.overview: With Susie's help, Midge hones her act at the Gaslight. Abe surprises the women with a dinner guest, sending Rose into an emotional spiral. Working towards a promotion, Joel conjures up a new plan. Midge stirs up controversy after meeting a big-time comedian.

the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.name: Ya Shivu v Bolshom Dome Na Kholme
the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.overview: Midge's life is in a tailspin in the wake of Joel leaving. Midge and Joel's parents butt heads while trying to keep their family together. Susie pushes Midge to get back on stage and find her voice.

the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.name: The Disappointment of the Dionne Quintuplets
the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.overview: Midge begins to move on from her once perfect life. Susie shows Midge the ropes while going on a tour of New York comedy clubs. Rose takes a bit too much pleasure in Midge's new living arrangements.

the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.name: Pilot
the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.overview: In 1958 New York, Midge Maisel's life is on track- husband, kids, and elegant Yom Kippur dinners in their Upper West Side apartment. But when her life takes a surprise turn, she has to quickly decide what else she's good at - and going from housewife to stand-up comic is a wild choice to everyone but her.

the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.name: Thank You and Good Night
the-marvelous-mrs-maisel-2017-tv.overview: In the Season One finale, Midge and Susie deal with the repercussions of Midge's off-script takedown of a famous comedian. With tensions still high at the Weissman household, Rose makes some bold changes. Midge and Joel reunite for Ethan's birthday party.

severance-2022-tv.name: Good News About Hell
severance-2022-tv.overview: Mark is promoted to lead a team who've had their memories surgically divided between their work and personal lives.

severance-2022-tv.name: Half Loop
severance-2022-tv.overview: The team train new hire Helly on macrodata refinement. Mark takes a day off to meet with a mysterious former colleague.

severance-2022-tv.name: The Grim Barbarity of Optics and Design
severance-2022-tv.overview: Irving and Dylan confront Burt about his lies. Mark and Helly discover a strange new department.

severance-2022-tv.name: The You You Are
severance-2022-tv.overview: Irving finds an intriguing book at work. Helly aggressively pursues a meeting with her Outie. Mark attends a funeral with Ms. Selvig.

severance-2022-tv.name: In Perpetuity
severance-2022-tv.overview: Mark takes the team on a field trip, but Helly continues to rebel. A deteriorating Petey struggles to tell Mark about Lumon’s misdeeds.

severance-2022-tv.name: Hide and Seek
severance-2022-tv.overview: The team angers Cobel by forming an alliance.

severance-2022-tv.name: What's for Dinner?
severance-2022-tv.overview: The team prepares a plan. Mark attends Devon and Ricken’s party.

severance-2022-tv.name: Defiant Jazz
severance-2022-tv.overview: Mark and the team encounter new security measures from Cobel.

the-mandalorian-2019-tv.name: Chapter 20: The Foundling
the-mandalorian-2019-tv.overview: Din Djarin returns to the hidden Mandalorian covert.

the-mandalorian-2019-tv.name: Chapter 18: The Mines of Mandalore
the-mandalorian-2019-tv.overview: The Mandalorian and Grogu explore the ruins of a destroyed planet.

the-mandalorian-2019-tv.name: Chapter 17: The Apostate
the-mandalorian-2019-tv.overview: The Mandalorian begins an important journey.

the-mandalorian-2019-tv.name: Chapter 21: The Pirate
the-mandalorian-2019-tv.overview: The people of Nevarro need protection from rampant pirate attacks.

the-mandalorian-2019-tv.name: Chapter 24: The Return
the-mandalorian-2019-tv.overview: The Mandalorian and his allies confront their enemies.

the-mandalorian-2019-tv.name: Chapter 19: The Convert
the-mandalorian-2019-tv.overview: On Coruscant, former Imperials find amnesty in the New Republic.

the-mandalorian-2019-tv.name: Chapter 22: Guns for Hire
the-mandalorian-2019-tv.overview: The Mandalorian visits an opulent world.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Shrink Wrap
dexter-2006-tv.overview: The strange suicide of a powerful woman leads Dexter to suspect her shrink of murder, but he gets a shock when a visit to the suspect opens up dark secrets from Dexter's past.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Let's Give the Boy a Hand
dexter-2006-tv.overview: The Ice Truck Killer's recent crime scenes send a secret message to Dexter Morgan, and lead him to remember his past.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Circle of Friends
dexter-2006-tv.overview: Rita must deal with the return of her menacing, recently paroled husband, Paul Bennett. The Ice Truck Killer is supposedly identified, but Dexter is skeptical.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Crocodile
dexter-2006-tv.overview: The Miami Metro Police Department investigate the murder of an undercover officer, while Dexter stalks another victim. Debra discovers a piece of evidence in the Ice Truck Killer Case that helps her get a promotion.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Popping Cherry
dexter-2006-tv.overview: While LaGuerta focuses the department's attention on a potential suspect in the Ice Truck Killer Case, Debra continues to look elsewhere. Doakes pays a visit to drug lord, Carlos Guerrero. Flashbacks show Dexter killing his first human.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Seeing Red
dexter-2006-tv.overview: Dexter Morgan is sent to investigate a blood-soaked crime scene, and is gripped by a suppressed memory. Meanwhile, Rita is charged with assaulting Paul and could lose the children in a custody battle. Angel investigates a hunch regarding The Ice Truck Killer.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Love American Style
dexter-2006-tv.overview: The Homicide Division is buzzing after The Ice Truck Killer's latest victim is found mutilated, while Dexter stalks a murderous human trafficker.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Dexter
dexter-2006-tv.overview: Dexter's world is rocked when a rival serial murderer, dubbed the Ice Truck Killer by the media, privately contacts him and reveals that he knows Dexter's grisly secret. Meanwhile, Dexter's sister, Debra, is transferred to Homicide.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Father Knows Best
dexter-2006-tv.overview: While on a weekend getaway with Rita, his sister and her new beau, Dexter learns that his biological father, thought to be dead for 30 years, has just passed away, and that he's willed his son everything he owned.

dexter-2006-tv.name: Return to Sender
dexter-2006-tv.overview: The Ice Truck Killer leaves a clue at the scene where Dexter has dispatched his latest victim, and Dexter is worried that someone might have witnessed his killing. Rita is trying to deal with her ex-husband.

what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.name: Nandor's Army
what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.overview: The vampires are sent on a mission to New Hampshire to retrieve Nandor, who has lost his mind.

what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.name: Laszlo's Father
what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.overview: Laszlo's father's ghost returns to make amends, while Nadja and Nandor deal with the shapeshifters who have moved in next door.

what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.name: March Madness
what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.overview: Laszlo and Nandor try to exorcise the demon who had possessed their neighbor Sean.

what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.name: P.I. Undercover: New York
what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.overview: Colin and Nadja have a couples' night with an old friend, while Nandor and Laszlo battle the film crew that have invaded their neighborhood.

what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.name: Come Out and Play
what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.overview: The vampires get blamed for a murder at a meeting of all the New York vampires and must find a way back to the safety of Staten Island.

what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.name: The Promotion
what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.overview: The vampires go to an office party to celebrate Guillermo's promotion.

what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.name: The Finale
what-we-do-in-the-shadows-2019-tv.overview: A surprising twist leads to a change of plans.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: Time Zones
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Don makes a new friend. Joan meets a client for drinks. Peggy hears impressive new work. Roger has a puzzling phone call.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: A Day's Work
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Peggy receives a bouquet of flowers at the office. Pete navigates the politics of new business. Joan is put in an impossibly awkward situation.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: The Monolith
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Sterling Cooper & Partners prepares for a guest; Don contacts an old friend; Roger deals with problems at home; Peggy is underestimated.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: Field Trip
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Don takes an impromptu trip. Betty has lunch with a friend. Harry lobbies for a cause. The partners consider a questionable asset.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: Severance
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Don attempts to track down a friend, Joan tries to solve a problem with an account and an unlikely person sets up Peggy.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: The Runaways
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Don has a visitor from his past. Stan embarrasses a superior. Peggy helps Ginsberg with a problem. Harry finds that he has a new ally at the agency.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: The Strategy
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Peggy determinedly collects research for a pitch. Pete is invited to join an exclusive club. Joan looks forward to spending time with her friend.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: Waterloo
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Don receives a troubling letter. A risky venture entails a new future for Peggy. Roger gets an unexpected phone call. Pete butts heads with Cutler.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: The Forecast
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Roger pawns off a project on Don, Joan goes on a business trip and Peggy and Pete cannot agree on how to deal with an account.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: New Business
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Roger gives Don some unwanted advice. Peggy and Stan disagree over an account's personnel. Harry asks for Don's blessing.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: Time & Life
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Don comes up with a big idea, Roger asks Joan to help him fix a clerical error and Peggy has difficulties casting for a commercial.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: Lost Horizon
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Don receives a reward for his work. Joan butts heads with her co-worker on an account. Faced with a big decision, Roger dodges.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: The Milk and Honey Route
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: Don has trouble sleeping. Pete is blindsided by a difficult friend. Facing a new challenge, Henry arranges a family reunion.

mad-men-2007-tv.name: Person to Person
mad-men-2007-tv.overview: The stories of Don Draper, his family and his co-workers at Sterling Cooper & Partners conclude.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Bus Tour
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: An important person in Pawnee dies while Leslie is on a bus tour for the final day of her campaign. Meanwhile Andy investigates a security threat, and Chris finds a cure for his depression.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Win, Lose, or Draw
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: It's election day in Pawnee, and Leslie and Bobby Newport are separated by a razor-thin margin. While everyone waits with Leslie for the race to be called, they ponder their futures, and their new opportunities.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Lucky
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben are thrilled when Buddy Wood wants to interview Leslie for his Indianapolis talkshow. April and Ron prep Andy for his final exam in his Women's Studies course.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Soda Tax
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie decides to wage war on obesity in Pawnee in her first mission as city councilor by passing a city-wide soda tax. Meanwhile, Andy tries to get in shape for his police-entrance exam, and Ben struggles to connect with the interns in his office.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ms. Knope Goes to Washington
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Andy visit Ben and April at their new jobs in Washington D.C., and Leslie feels overwhelmed by the city -- especially after meeting two of her idols. Meanwhile, Ron throws a "thank you" barbeque for the entire Parks and Recreation staff.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: How a Bill Becomes a Law
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie helps a local swim team get more practice time by working on a new law that extends the hours at the community pool; Ron finds himself filling a pothole for a local woman (Lucy Lawless) as part of Chris' new plan to solve citizens' problems around the city; April and Ben take a road trip to Pawnee.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ben's Parents
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie is nervous about meeting Ben's divorced parents. Tom prepares to pitch his new business to Ron with Jean-Ralphio's help. Chris rides an emotional rollercoaster.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Sex Education
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: An STD outbreak amongst Pawnee seniors prompts Leslie to conduct a sex education class. Meanwhile, Ron helps Tom adjust to life without technology after his gadgets are taken away, and Ben and April meet Congressman Murray for the first time.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Halloween Surprise
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: A new job offer for Ben causes Leslie to contemplates their future. Meanwhile, Ron and Andy take Diane's girls out trick-or-treating, and Tom searches for a new business idea.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Leslie vs. April
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie gets upset when April tries to get Lot 48 made into a dog park. Meanwhile, Tom enlists Ben's help as he tries to launch his new business venture, and Andy hones his crime scene investigation skills.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Pawnee Commons
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben meet with an architect from their rival town, Eagleton, about designs for a new park.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Two Parties
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ben and Leslie's rival bachelor and bachelorette parties each take on a very different tune.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ron and Diane
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ron, Diane, and Leslie attend a wood working awards dinner after one of Ron's handcrafted chairs is nominated, but the happy occasion is threatened by the arrival of Tammy II. Meanwhile, Jerry hosts a holiday party at his home with his wife, and some of his friends are shocked to find they were not invited.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ann's Decision
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ann tries to get to know herself as Leslie meddles in one of her biggest life decisions. Meanwhile, things go south when Ben enlists the guys to help choose a caterer for the wedding.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Emergency Response
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben organize a black tie gala to raise money for their park, but their plans are derailed when a city-wide emergency response drill is called. Meanwhile, Andy prepares to take his Police Academy Exam and Ron fills in for Leslie on Pawnee Today.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Women in Garbage
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and April handle a garbage route, while Tom asks Andy and Ben to teach him about basketball. Meanwhile, Ron is left to watch Diane's kids while their babysitter is out of town.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Leslie and Ben
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben are getting married, and have to cram months of planning into two hours. Meanwhile, Ron's temper gets him in trouble.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Bailout
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie is determined to help a local video store stay in business, while Chris offers Tom advice on how to deal with a difficult employee. Elsewhere, Ann resorts to blackmail to get April to be her friend.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Correspondents' Lunch
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie's speech she prepared for a special event is stolen. Ben begins his new job at the Sweetums Charity Foundation. Ann summons the courage to ask an important question.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Partridge
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie accompanies Ben on a trip to his hometown which has offered him a key to the city. Ron deals with a lawsuit filed against him by Councilman Jamm. Ann and Chris take a parenting compatibility quiz.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Animal Control
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie decides to give the Animal Control Department a much-needed makeover. Ann tries to get Ron the medical attention he needs. Ben, Tom, and Andy recruit donors for their charity foundation.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Article Two
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie works to get rid of outdated laws from the original town charter. April and Ron receive management training from Chris. Ben finds himself in a bidding war against Ann to win a present for Leslie.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Swing Vote
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie deems Ron's budget-cut proposals unacceptable. Andy and Ben celebrate a big donation made to their charity. Ann tries to solve Tom's girlfriend troubles.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Are You Better Off?
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie celebrates her first year as a city councilwoman. Retired Special Agent Burt Macklin is recalled to action. April gets some life-changing news. Tom debates a big business opportunity.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Jerry's Retirement
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: When Leslie finds out Jerry is retiring, she struggles with the proper way to commemorate the occasion. Chris and Ann prepare to have a baby together. Tom worries he will become the office punching bag once Jerry leaves.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Filibuster
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie throws Ben a birthday bash but is forced to leave early for an emergency late-night filibuster. Tom tries to make some memories with his new girlfriend, Ron and Donna go hunting. April reconnects with Andy.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Second Chunce
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie comes to terms with her last day in office and plans for the future with Ben. Chris and Ann find out the sex of their child, Andy comes home from London, and Tom looks to the future.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: New Beginnings
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben both face new challenges on the first day of new jobs. Donna, April and Andy play a prank on Ben, while Tom prepares for a big presentation. Meanwhile Ann and Chris contemplate taking a big leap together.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Farmers Market
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie fights with Ben over questionable sales techniques at the local farmers market. Ann searches for a way to vent about the annoying aspects of pregnancy, while April supports Andy in a new creative venture.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ann and Chris
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: On Ann and Chris's last night in Pawnee, Leslie throws a grand farewell party and attempts to fulfill one last promise. Meanwhile, Tom, Ben, Ron and Andy struggle to find the perfect going away gift for Chris.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: New Slogan
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie aims to create a new town slogan, but runs afoul of local shock jocks. Andy scouts bands to play the Unity Concert and discovers an interesting secret about Ron, while Tom looks for a restaurant locale with Donna and April.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Anniversaries
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ben attempts to surprise Leslie with a special anniversary gift. Tom and Adam try to help Leslie bring positive light to the Pawnee-Eagleton merger, while April asserts her new authority as Donna's boss.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Wall
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie's efforts to take down the wall separating Eagleton and Pawnee yield unexpected results; Ben and Tom meet with possible sponsors for the concert; Ron finds a new hobby.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Galentine's Day
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie throws a hasty Galentine's Day in an attempt to find a replacement for Ann. Tom and Ben look to finalize a deal on tents for the Unity Concert, while Ron finds himself looking after Andy.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Prom
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie helps organize the high school's Senior Prom, and battles with Ron over the future employment of a bright high school senior. Andy takes an unwilling April as his date, and Tom is tasked with DJ'ing and agrees to let Ben help.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Flu Season 2
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: In the midst of flu season, a sick Leslie and Andy struggle to book performers for the Unity Concert. Meanwhile, Tom heads to a wine competition in search of a sommelier for his new restaurant, and Ben seeks drunken help from Ron with a personal problem.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: One in 8,000
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben run a charity auction to raise funds for the unity concert. April steps in to manage Andy's schedule, while Donna asks Ron for help with her ex-boyfriend.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Moving Up
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie, Ben, and Andy head to San Francisco for a National Parks Conference. Tom opens his restaurant, Ron has another run-in with his ex-wife Tammy 2, Andy lives a rock and roll fantasy, and Leslie makes a huge decision about her future.

Leslie launches a competition with tech company Gryzzl for a large parcel of land, which she wants to turn into a National Park. April and Andy try to regain their spontaneity. Ben is recognized at a Bicentennial gala, where Tom delivers a speech in his honor.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ron and Jammy
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ron briefly put aside their feud to help old foe Jeremy Jamm escape the clutches of the diabolical Tammy 2. Ben vows to help April discover her true passion in life, while Andy and Tom travel to Chicago.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: William Henry Harrison
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie's team tries to strengthen her case that the Newport land should be turned into a National Park. Ron's team, fighting back, brings on a celebrity as a minority owner.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Leslie and Ron
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ron attempt to work out their differences.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Donna and Joe
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Donna and Joe tie the knot, while April attempts to keep the wedding running smoothly. Ron creates an awkward situation between Tom and Lucy. Jen Barkley arrives at Ben and Leslie's house with an interesting opportunity.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Gryzzlbox
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben suspect that Gryzzl is invading the privacy of Pawnee residents. April addresses the new Parks and Rec interns, while Tom helps Andy renegotiate a contract.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Pie-Mary
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben come under fire for participating in an old Pawnee tradition. April and Ron go on a scavenger hunt. Donna and Garry stroll down memory lane.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ms. Ludgate-Dwyer Goes to Washington
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: While Leslie and April take a business trip to Washington, April wrestles with her future. Back in Pawnee, Andy tries to find April the perfect job.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Johnny Karate Super Awesome Musical Explosion Show
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: On the last episode of Andy's TV show, his friends wish him luck with whatever comes next.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: One Last Ride
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: The Parks gang completes one last task together, before saying goodbye to Pawnee.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Save JJ's
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie holds a rally in an attempt to keep JJ's Diner from closing. Tom surprises Donna with the ultimate pre-wedding gift.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Two Funerals
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ben and April conduct a series of interviews, while Andy and Donna help Ron adjust to a life change.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Pilot
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Indiana government worker Leslie Knope is given the assignment to convert an abandoned quarry pit into a community park. A documentary film crew follows Leslie through her mishaps and gaffes as she tries to make her assignment a reality.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Canvassing
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie decides that she and her committee need to go door-to-door to gain support for the park project as well as support for an upcoming town hall meeting, but their mission does not go as planned. Meanwhile, Tom wanders away from the canvassing group and uses his own creative recruitment tactics.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: I'm Leslie Knope
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie is torn between Ben and her dreams of running for public office, while Ron braces himself for the arrival of his first wife, the original Tammy.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ron and Tammys
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ron's first ex-wife, Tammy One, reenters his life and tries to control his every move. Meanwhile, Ben helps Tom balance the books at his new company, and Ann makes a PSA, with help from Chris.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Born and Raised
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie's book about Pawnee comes out just in time for her campaign. Ann tries to bond with Ron and April.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Li'l Sebastian
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and the parks team put together a memorial service for a dearly departed friend. Meanwhile, Tom makes a big life decision, while Chris reacts badly to a health problem.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Meet 'n' Greet
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Andy and April host a Halloween bash at their house. Tom emcees an event for Leslie's campaign. Andy and April receive an unusual wedding present from Ron and Ann.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Pawnee Rangers
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ron takes his boys-only troop of Pawnee Rangers into the wild. Not wanting the girls to feel left out, Leslie also takes her troop of Pawnee Goddesses on an adventure weekend. Meanwhile, a reluctant Ben joins Tom and Donna for a day of relaxation, and Chris spends some time with Jerry.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Treaty
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie enlists the help of Ben, Andy and April to host a Model U.N. for Pawnee Central High School. Chris asks Ann for her advice on love when a date cancels on him. Meanwhile, Ron struggles to find a replacement for Tom.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: End of the World
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: A local Pawnee group predicts the end of days, causing chaos in the Parks department.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Smallest Park
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie uses her new tourist attraction as a way to spend more time with Ben. Meanwhile, Ron and April encourage Andy to go to college, and Chris tasks Tom and Jerry with revamping the Parks and Rec logo.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Trial of Leslie Knope
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie has to face an ethics committee about her secret relationship with Ben after they come clean to Chris.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Citizen Knope
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Unable to get work done from inside the Parks Department, Leslie forms a citizen action group and fights from the outside. Meanwhile, everyone in the office brainstorms ideas for what to get Leslie for Christmas.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Comeback Kid
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie enlists everyone's help in staging an attention-getting event. Ben takes up a new hobby, while April and Andy adopt a pet.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Campaign Ad
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Faced with a tough new opponent, Leslie and Ben disagree on the content of her first campaign ad. Ron is very uncomfortable when Chris tries to befriend him, while Andy and April make a trip to the doctor.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Bowling for Votes
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben host a bowling night after receiving feedback about Leslie's campaign. April, Chris, and Jerry hold a competition to see who can raise the most funds.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Operation Ann
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie works to find Ann a Valentine's date. Ron helps Ben with a scavenger hunt, and Chris becomes depressed over his love life.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Dave Returns
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: While trying to get an endorsement from the Chief of Police, Leslie and Ben awkwardly run into Leslie's old flame, Dave. Meanwhile, Andy and the rest of the office work on a theme song for Leslie's campaign.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Sweet Sixteen
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie realizes that the department has forgotten Jerry's birthday and decides to throw a party for him at a special location. Meanwhile, Tom is flabbergasted when he finds out Ann doesn't share his taste in music.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Campaign Shake-Up
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and Ben are caught off guard when her opponent Bobby Newport hires a powerful campaign manager from Washington. Chris forces Ron to start interviewing replacements for Leslie when work starts falling through the cracks, and an unlikely officemate solves a challenging problem.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Live Ammo
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie discovers that the Parks Department budget is about to be cut, and she later meets the City Council member she is running to replace. Chris and Ron visit a meditation center.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Debate
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie goes toe-to-toe with Bobby Newport in a debate. Ann, Tom, and Chris work in the media spin room, while Ron goes the extra mile to save a party for Leslie's donors.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Doppelgängers
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie pairs up the Pawnee Parks employees with their Eagleton counterparts. Meanwhile Ben and Chris reunite for an accounting project, and Ann reveals her plans for the future.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Gin It Up!
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie tries to calm a minor scandal that gets blown out of proportion. Tom tries to impress a new love interest, while Ben convinces Ron to prepare a will.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Recall Vote
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie prepares a haunted house with Ben, Ann and Chris for Halloween on the day of the recall vote. Meanwhile, Tom fears the end of Rent-A-Swag and persuades Ron to help save his business.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: London
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie wins an award from an international Women in Government organization, and travels to London with Ben, Andy, April and Ron to accept it.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Fluoride
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie tries to complete some of her biggest city council goals, like hosting an NFL Play 60 event with the Indianapolis Colts, and trying to add fluoride to Pawnee's drinking water. Meanwhile, Chris and Ron attempt to bond while building cribs for their future children.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Cones of Dunshire
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie faces off with Councilman Jamm; Ben gets a new hobby; Tom, April and Donna help Ron sell his cabin.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Beauty Pageant
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie gets to judge a beauty contest, but ends up having conflicting opinions on "the ideal woman" with the other judges. While on a date with Mark, Ann learns Andy has been living in the pit.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Stakeout
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: While tending to the new community garden, Leslie and Tom discover someone has planted marijuana among the vegetables. In an effort to catch the people responsible, they pull an all-night stakeout. With Leslie's permission, Ann decides to go on a date with Mark.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Pawnee Zoo
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: When Leslie decides to marry two penguins to promote the local zoo, she inadvertently causes an uproar when both penguins turn out to be male. Meanwhile, Mark puts Ann in an awkward situation when he asks her to go see a movie.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Practice Date
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie is nervous about her first date with Dave, so Ann takes her on a practice date to help her prepare. Meanwhile, after a local councilman is caught up in a sex scandal, Tom, Ron, April and Mark decide to see who can uncover the worst dirt on each other.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Greg Pikitis
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie enlists the help of Dave and Andy in order to catch a local teen vandal. Meanwhile, Ann struggles to make her Halloween party fun, and ends up getting help from an unlikely source.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ron and Tammy
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie is upset when she learns the library department wants to take over her lot. Making matters worse, the library is run by Ron's ex-wife Tammy, who still has a powerful emotional hold on him. Meanwhile, Andy gets a job in hopes of winning Ann back.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Sister City
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie plays host to the Parks and Recreation department from Pawnee's sister city, Boraqua, Venezuela, and is shocked at the cultural differences. Tom becomes an errand boy, and April plays hard to get.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Kaboom
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie, Ann and the rest of the Parks Department volunteer to help the organization KaBOOM! build a playground for a neighboring town. After building an entire playground in one day, Leslie gets frustrated at the lack of progress with the pit, and takes some advice from Mark to cut through the red tape.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Christmas Scandal
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie designs the Pawnee Winter Wonderland Festival, but has to hide from the press when a meeting with a disgraced Councilman lands her in the middle of a sex scandal. Meanwhile, Ron offers to cover for Leslie for the day, and quickly discovers how much work she really does.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Camel
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: After one of the murals ("The Spirit of Pawnee") in City Hall is defaced, Leslie and the Parks Department compete to come up with a new design. Meanwhile, Andy and Ron share an uncomfortable moment at the shoeshine stand.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Hunting Trip
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie tries to prove she can hang with the guys so she invites herself on Ron's annual hunting trip, but things don't go as planned. Meanwhile, April and Andy bond in the office while everyone is away.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Tom's Divorce
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: After Leslie finds out that Tom is getting a divorce, the department takes him out on the town to cheer him up. Meanwhile, Andy tries to hustle Mark in a game of pool.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Sweetums
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: The Parks Department forms a partnership with a local company to sell energy bars at the parks in Pawnee, but Leslie tries to stop the deal when she discovers how unhealthy the snacks are. Mark reluctantly agrees to help Tom move out of his house.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Leslie's House
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: After an amazing date with Justin in Indianapolis, Leslie tries to impress him with a dinner party at her house.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Galentine's Day
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: When Leslie hears her mom's story about an old flame, she and her boyfriend Justin track him down and reunite them on Valentine's Day. Meanwhile, Andy and his band are nervous about playing a gig at the Senior Center.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Set Up
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ann sets Leslie up on a blind date with a co-worker, which does not go as well as Leslie hoped. An old friend of Ann's makes Mark feel insecure.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Possum
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: When a possum bites the mayor's dog on a golf course, Leslie is asked to form a task force to catch the pesky animal. Meanwhile, Ron is upset when Mark refuses to bend the rules for him.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Woman of the Year
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie is outraged when Ron wins a "Woman of the Year" award for a project she started. Meanwhile, Tom is desperate to find some money to invest in a local Pawnee club.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Summer Catalog
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Preparing the Summer Events Catalog, Leslie decides to take Ron and the past directors of the Parks Department out for a picnic lunch. Tom enlists the help of Ann and Mark to pose for the cover photo.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Park Safety
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: After Jerry gets mugged by a bunch of kids, Leslie meets with the head park ranger in hopes of improving park safety. Meanwhile, everyone tries to be nicer to Jerry once he returns to the office.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: 94 Meetings
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ron is furious when April mistakenly schedules a ton of meetings for him. Meanwhile, Leslie fights to preserve a historical landmark.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Telethon
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie hosts a late-night shift for a local telethon, and lands former Indiana Pacer Detlef Schrempf as a celebrity guest. Meanwhile, Mark has big plans for his relationship with Ann.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Freddy Spaghetti
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: When Ben prevents Leslie from holding a children's concert, she takes matters into her own hands. Mark makes some big decisions about his life, and Andy gets some unexpected romantic attention.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Master Plan
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie is disappointed when her new park plans are put on hold by a visit from two state auditors. April has plans for Andy at her birthday party, and Ann tries to piece together a romantic mystery.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Go Big or Go Home
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie and the Parks Department return to work after three months to discover that the budget crisis still looms. After unsuccessfully trying to have their budget restored by using Ann to charm Chris with a date, Leslie decides to make an all or nothing play by resurrecting the Pawnee Harvest Festival. Meanwhile, Ben restarts the youth basketball league and instates Ron and Andy to coach the only two teams. April returns from a vacation with a new boyfriend.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Flu Season
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: While planning for the local Harvest Festival, Leslie is struck with the flu and is forced to go to the hospital. Ron and Andy have a day of male bonding, and Tom hits the spa.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Ron & Tammy: Part Two
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Tom tries to get back at Ron by going out on a date with Ron's ex-wife Tammy, while Leslie tries to protect Ron from falling prey to her charms. Meanwhile, April is assigned to work with Chris.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Time Capsule
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie wants to bury a time capsule that encapsulates life in Pawnee, but an odd suggestion from a local man causes unforeseen consequences. Andy seeks help from Chris about how to win back April.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Indianapolis
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Ron and Leslie take a road trip to the big city in order to visit Ron's favorite place which happens to be a steakhouse, but Leslie has alternative motives for the trip.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Media Blitz
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: While advertising for the Harvest Festival, Ben has to deal with some troubling questions about his past. Meanwhile, Andy continues to try to win April back.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Camping
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie takes the whole department camping in order to brainstorm new ideas. Meanwhile, Andy attempts a romantic gesture for April, while Ann gets nervous when Chris returns to Pawnee as the new city manager.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Harvest Festival
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: It's make it or break it for the Parks Department at the Harvest Festival which is full of surprises.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Soulmates
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie tries an online dating service, but doesn't end up with a stranger as she expects. Also, Chris challenges Ron to a grilling competition as part of his plans to make Pawnee healthier.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Andy and April's Fancy Party
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: April and Andy host a dinner party for the Parks Department. Meanwhile, Ann tries to move on from Chris at a singles' party.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Eagleton
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie's ex-best friend, Lindsay Carlisle Shay, launches an attack on Pawnee, banning residents from visiting a nearby park in the neighboring city of Eagleton with a large fence, causing Leslie to go to war with Eagleton. Meanwhile, everyone finds out that it is Ron's birthday, a fact that he went to extreme lengths to conceal.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Jerry's Painting
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Jerry's contribution to Leslie's community art show causes a stir. Ben moves in with April and Andy and attempts to teach them how to be adults. Meanwhile, Leslie is frustrated by Chris and his interoffice dating rules.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Bubble
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Everyone in the office is unhappy when Chris decides to make some big changes in the parks department -- especially Tom who starts to question his career choices. Leslie is caught off guard when Ben has a meeting with her mom.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Banquet
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: During a banquet honoring her mother's public service, Leslie tries to convince a local zoning official to support her proposed park project. Meanwhile, Mark and Tom try to meet some ladies.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Rock Show
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: Leslie attends what she believes is a business meeting with an elderly local government bigwig, unaware that her mother has secretly set her up on a blind date. Andy plays his first gig since breaking both of his legs in the pit.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: Road Trip
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: When Chris sends Leslie and Ben on a trip to Indianapolis, Leslie is afraid she won't be able to deny her feelings for him. Ron teaches a young student about his views on government. Meanwhile, Andy gets his feelings hurt by April after playing Tom's new game.

parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.name: The Fight
parks-and-recreation-2009-tv.overview: When Leslie tries to get Ann a job at city hall, her lukewarm reaction causes their first-ever fight. Tom invites the entire department to the Snakehole Lounge to help him promote his new alcohol, "Snake Juice."

the-prisoner-1967-tv.name: Arrival
the-prisoner-1967-tv.overview: After resigning, a secret agent finds himself trapped in a bizarre prison known only as The Village.

the-prisoner-1967-tv.name: The Chimes of Big Ben
the-prisoner-1967-tv.overview: A new Number 8 named Nadia arrives in The Village, and together Number 6 and she plot their escape.

the-prisoner-1967-tv.name: Free for All
the-prisoner-1967-tv.overview: Number 6 runs for the office of Number 2.

the-prisoner-1967-tv.name: A., B. and C.
the-prisoner-1967-tv.overview: Number 2 believes that Number 6 resigned because he was going to sell out. Using dream manipulation, Number 2 tries to determine which one of three possible candidates Number 6 was dealing with.

the-prisoner-1967-tv.name: The Schizoid Man
the-prisoner-1967-tv.overview: Number Six wakes up with a new identity. Now he's Number Twelve. Worse, Number Two asks him to impersonate someone--Number Six. But the new Number Six is more like him than he is.

the-prisoner-1967-tv.name: The General
the-prisoner-1967-tv.overview: An instant learning process becomes the Village's latest fad, but Number 6 is sure that Number 2 is using it as a brain washing tool.

john-adams-2008-tv.name: Join or Die
john-adams-2008-tv.overview: In an emotionally charged trial John Adams defends the British sentries involved in the Boston Massacre who contend they were provoked into firing on the assembled crowd. John's success brings him offers of positions in the Massachusetts government. But after John Hancock rouses a crowd to tar and feather a representative of the British East India Tea Company and the British respond to the growing unrest with oppressive measures, John instead speaks against the British policies and chooses to represent Massachusetts in the Continental Congress.

john-adams-2008-tv.name: Don't Tread on Me
john-adams-2008-tv.overview: Over the emotional objections of Abigail, John Adam and his son endure turbulent seas and an encounter with the British Navy to join Ben Franklin on a diplomatic mission to Paris. But Ben cannot restrain John's abrasive personality which is even less well suited to Paris than Philadelphia.

john-adams-2008-tv.name: Independence
john-adams-2008-tv.overview: After viewing the dead and wounded on the battlefield of Concord, John Adams takes up the cause of Independence. Frustrated by the caution of delegates from colonies that do not share Massachusetts plight, the inexperienced politician is abrasive, obnoxious and even insulting. But with the advice of Abigail and Ben Franklin he soon learns he has allies, to cultivate them, to bide his time and to seize opportunities. Following John's nomination, George Washington takes charge of the army and enjoys successes despite supply shortages. Back at home, Abigail and the children risk supporting the war effort in most tangible ways but find Mother Nature more threatening.

john-adams-2008-tv.name: Reunion
john-adams-2008-tv.overview: Following the surrender of the British, John secures a long sought loan from the Dutch and returns to Paris to oversee the peace treaty. John can no longer bear his absence from Abigail and invites her to Paris which immediately overwhelms her with it's opulence. John is appointed ambassador to England but soon longs to return home to participate in the formation of the new government and, like Abigail, to be reunited with the children. They return home to an overwhelming welcome and John reluctantly returns to public service.

john-adams-2008-tv.name: Unite or Die
john-adams-2008-tv.overview: John Adams chaffs under the mantle of Vice President for its utter lack of authority and responsibility. Despite his abhorrence of the divisiveness of political parties John is drawn to the Federalist camp favoring a strong executive. Divisions even reach into the President's cabinet, exacerbated by war in Europe.

john-adams-2008-tv.name: Unnecessary War
john-adams-2008-tv.overview: Following the peace treaty with England President Adams struggles to avoid war with France despite pressure from his Federalist cabinet and French provocation. John finds the price of peace to his career and the price of his long career of public service to his family is indeed high.

john-adams-2008-tv.name: Peacefield
john-adams-2008-tv.overview: In retirement John Adams laments the perils of a long life; loss of loved ones and growing irrelevance. But out of tragedy John rekindles his broken friendship with Thomas Jefferson and lives to discuss John Quincy's ambitious presidential agenda with him.

community-2009-tv.name: Spanish 101
community-2009-tv.overview: While Jeff looks to use a Spanish class assignment to get close to Britta, Pierce has something altogether different in mind.

community-2009-tv.name: Pilot
community-2009-tv.overview: When the legitimacy of his degree is challenged, lawyer Jeff Winger must return to school, where he meets a clan of misfit community college students.

community-2009-tv.name: Introduction to Film
community-2009-tv.overview: Jeff struggles to get a good grade, and Britta's offer to bankroll his film class exposes a rift between Abed and his angry father.

community-2009-tv.name: Social Psychology
community-2009-tv.overview: As Annie recruits Abed and Troy for a psychology class experiment, Jeff and Shirley bond over their mutual fondness for gossip.

community-2009-tv.name: Advanced Criminal Law
community-2009-tv.overview: As Pierce volunteers to compose a new school song, a cheating episode in Spanish class leaves Jeff defending Britta before a disciplinary tribunal.

community-2009-tv.name: Home Economics
community-2009-tv.overview: Jeff is forced out of his condo and into Abed's dorm room, and Annie looks to get Troy's attention by helping him plan a romantic picnic.

community-2009-tv.name: Debate 109
community-2009-tv.overview: As Jeff is drafted to help lead Greendale's debate team against the formidable City College, Abed's film-class projects appear to predict the future.

community-2009-tv.name: Football, Feminism and You
community-2009-tv.overview: Annie's dream of being the ex-football star's girlfriend is in jeopardy when Jeff is blackmailed into getting Troy to join Greendale's football team.

community-2009-tv.name: Introduction to Statistics
community-2009-tv.overview: Jeff sets his sights on an attractive professor, and Annie looks to boost her social standing by hosting a Day of the Dead party.

community-2009-tv.name: Environmental Science
community-2009-tv.overview: Faced with an unreasonable amount of Spanish homework, Jeff's efforts to handle Señor Chang manage to help him, but not the rest of the class.

community-2009-tv.name: The Politics of Human Sexuality
community-2009-tv.overview: With his high-price "escort" girlfriend on his arm, Pierce pressures Jeff into asking Dean Pelton's airhead secretary to double date at the STD Fair.

community-2009-tv.name: Comparative Religion
community-2009-tv.overview: Shirley's plans for a holiday party are in jeopardy when Jeff is drawn into a fight with a campus bully.

community-2009-tv.name: Investigative Journalism
community-2009-tv.overview: Jeff accepts an invitation to be the editor of the school paper as he and his friends fend off an interloper who wants to join their study group.

community-2009-tv.name: Romantic Expressionism
community-2009-tv.overview: Jeff and Britta team up to derail Annie's fledgling romance with Greendale's resident hippie singer-songwriter, Vaughn.

community-2009-tv.name: Physical Education
community-2009-tv.overview: The study group helps Abed land a date with a girl, and Jeff squares off with a P.E. coach who insists that he wear gym shorts to a billiards class.

community-2009-tv.name: Communication Studies
community-2009-tv.overview: As Valentine's Day finds Jeff struggling with his feelings for Britta and Professor Slater, Pierce and Troy are wrongly blamed for a prank.

community-2009-tv.name: Interpretive Dance
community-2009-tv.overview: As Jeff and Prof. Slater try to keep their student-teacher romance under wraps, Britta and Troy tell everyone about their shared passion for dance.

community-2009-tv.name: Basic Genealogy
community-2009-tv.overview: As Family Day lands Jeff in the middle of an affair with Pierce's sexy ex-stepdaughter, Shirley's unruly sons help liberate Abed's Afghani cousin.

community-2009-tv.name: Beginner Pottery
community-2009-tv.overview: A pottery class he takes for an easy A reveals Jeff's deep-seated need to succeed.

community-2009-tv.name: Contemporary American Poultry
community-2009-tv.overview: A scheme to replace a corrupt cafeteria employee transforms the study group into a criminal gang run by a power-hungry Abed.

community-2009-tv.name: The Art of Discourse
community-2009-tv.overview: While a tasteless prank ends with Pierce being tossed out of the group, Britta and Jeff are forced to team up against some teen newcomers at school.

community-2009-tv.name: Modern Warfare
community-2009-tv.overview: The first prize of priority registration engulfs Greendale Community College in a Spring Fling paintball war.

community-2009-tv.name: The Science of Illusion
community-2009-tv.overview: When her April Fools' Day prank inadvertently sends a human cadaver out the anatomy lab window, Britta looks to place the blame on Jeff.

community-2009-tv.name: English as a Second Language
community-2009-tv.overview: On the eve of an important final exam in Spanish, everyone's grades are jeopardized when it is discovered that Señor Chang has a damaging secret.

community-2009-tv.name: Pascal's Triangle Revisited
community-2009-tv.overview: As the end of the school year finds Jeff at the apex of a romantic triangle, Annie ponders moving away with her hacky sack-playing boyfriend.

the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.name: A Family Festival
the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.overview: The elder generation of Forsytes gather at Uncle Timothy's to exchange gossip about two of the younger members of the family: James's daughter Winifred is engaged to the charming but financially questionable Montague Dartie, while Jolyon's married son, Jo, commits adultery with the Austrian governess, Helene. Old Jo overhears the gossip at Winifred's wedding, while Helene has bittersweet news for Young Jo: they are going to have a child.

the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.name: A Family Scandal
the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.overview: Young Jo’s decision to divorce his wife to live with Helene and their child shocks the family, and causes Old Jo to adjust his will in favor of his granddaughter June. Elsewhere, stuffy lawyer Soames Forsyte is enchanted with young but penniless Irene Herrin, whose ethereal beauty will be the catalyst for much of the series.

the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.name: The Pursuit of Happiness
the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.overview: Two sons are born. Winifred and her profligate husband Monty must appeal to her father James to ease Monty’s debts, as Winifred gives birth to her son, Val. The accidental death of Young Jo’s first wife allows Jo and Helene to legally marry. Helene gives birth to the third generation of Jolyon Forsytes, nicknamed Jolly, while Old Jo assumes parental authority over granddaughter June. Soames methodically and relentlessly pursues an unwilling Irene, who finally accepts his marriage proposal, but with one condition: that he release her from the marriage if they are not happy. Their wedding night sets the stage for despair ahead.

the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.name: Dinner at Swithin's
the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.overview: Several years have passed, and the family is abuzz over the engagement of young June Forsyte to bohemian architect Phillip Bosinney. June’s best friend and confidante, Irene, endures an icy marriage to Soames, but sexual sparks fly when she and Bosinney meet. In the poorer part of town, Helene’s extreme guilt over keeping Jo from his daughter June is making her ill, while the estranged Old and Young Jo take tentative steps toward reconciliation.

the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.name: A Man of Property
the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.overview: Winifred’s spendthrift husband Monty continues to rack up debts, while Soames has bigger marital problems. Attempting to improve his disastrous marriage, Soames engages Bosinney to build a mansion for Irene at Robin Hill, a country estate far removed from London. June suspects what Soames does not, that a powerful attraction exists between Irene and Bosinney. The attraction ignites a sexual liaison. Meanwhile, Old Jo surprises his son and Helene at their modest home, and attempts to mend the rift in the family. Young Jo astounds his relatives by attending the funeral of the eldest Forsyte, Aunt Ann.

the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.name: Decisions
the-forsyte-saga-1967-tv.overview: As the affair between Irene and Bosinney becomes more and more public, Soames threatens legal action against the architect regarding cost overruns at Robin Hill. June hides her confusion with stubborn allegiance to Bosinney, while, enraged and frustrated, Soames violently asserts his marital rights.

star-wars-the-clone-wars-2008-tv.name: Old Friends Not Forgotten
star-wars-the-clone-wars-2008-tv.overview: The Siege of Mandalore begins, and Ahsoka turns to Anakin and Obi-Wan for help.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Tomb of the Cybermen (2)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: The archaeologists learn they are stranded on Telos and Klieg suggests they use the opportunity to explore the Cybermen's tombs.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Tomb of the Cybermen (3)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: The Cybermen have been revived and plan to convert the archeologists into their own kind, prompting Hopper to attempt a rescue.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Tomb of the Cybermen (4)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: Klieg attempts to do a deal with the Cybercontroller while the Doctor tries to find a way to refreeze the Cybermen permanently.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Tomb of the Cybermen (1)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: The Doctor, Jamie and Victoria arrive on Telos, where an archaeological group are exploring the Tomb of the Cybermen. But are the Cybermen as dormant as they believe?

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Abominable Snowmen (1)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: When the TARDIS materialises in the Himalayas, the Doctor decides to pay a return visit to the nearby Det-Sen monastery only to be accused of murder.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Abominable Snowmen (2)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: Jamie and Victoria make their way to the monastery shortly before it is attacked by the Yeti.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Abominable Snowmen (3)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: While the Doctor and Jamie return to the TARDIS for equipment, the control sphere Jamie brought to the monastery is reactivated.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Ice Warriors (1)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: The Doctor, Jamie and Victoria are brought to a base which is attempting to halt the flow of the Second Ice Age.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Abominable Snowmen (4)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: The Yeti escapes from the monastery and Victoria and Thonmi are accused of assisting it, while the Doctor and Jamie endure a perilous journey back across the mountains.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Abominable Snowmen (6)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: With the Great Intelligence on the verge of becoming corporeal, the Doctor challenges Padmasambhva to a mental battle in order to defeat it.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Abominable Snowmen (5)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: Victoria falls under the mental influence of Padmasambhva as the Yeti attack in order to drive the monks from the area.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Ice Warriors (3)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: Jamie and Arden venture out to rescue Victoria only to find the rest of the Ice Warriors are now active.

doctor-who-1963-tv.name: The Ice Warriors (2)
doctor-who-1963-tv.overview: Varga revives and takes Victoria hostage as he works to revive his crew while the Doctor and Jamie find Penley stealing medical supplies.

i-love-lucy-1951-tv.name: The Tour
i-love-lucy-1951-tv.overview: Lucy and Ethel are abandoned by their sightseeing bus tour when they try to get a grapefruit from Richard Widmark's garden. When Lucy is stranded inside the garden wall, she and Ethel, who is outside, launch plans to get Lucy out -- but without comparing notes on how. Film star Richard Widmark guest-stars as himself.

star-trek-1966-tv.name: Charlie X
star-trek-1966-tv.overview: Raised from boyhood by non-corporeal beings, 17 year old Charles Evans is picked up and transferred to the Enterprise. On board the ship, the teenager proves dangerously unable to wield his enormous psionic powers with maturity.

invisible-city-2021-tv.name: I Won't Hurt You
invisible-city-2021-tv.overview: After removing Bento's curse, Eric uses his new powers to search for Luna. Débora finds a new key to Marangatu and sets up a very private auction.

invisible-city-2021-tv.name: My Biggest Wish
invisible-city-2021-tv.overview: A murder takes place in the heart of the Amazon forest. Luna and Inês embark on a mission to find Eric. Meanwhile, Matinta Perê offers her services.

invisible-city-2021-tv.name: The Life We Always Dreamed Of
invisible-city-2021-tv.overview: Lazo and Luna become friends while locked up in captivity. Meanwhile, Eric, Clarice and Inês try to invade Débora's secret auction to set them free.

invisible-city-2021-tv.name: Your Fear Is Your Poison
invisible-city-2021-tv.overview: While Luna goes through a life-changing healing experience deep within the forest, Eric finds it hard to control his ever-growing powers.

invisible-city-2021-tv.name: Marangatu: A Sacred Place
invisible-city-2021-tv.overview: Débora confronts Castro after learning about her past. Meanwhile, Eric embarks on a painful journey to examine what is developing inside his chest.
